                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 40623,
                  "content": "        \"contents\": \"- **Full Details**: See &amp;#96;../../../docs/internal/05-system-architecture.md&amp;#96;\\n- **Audio Details**: See &amp;#96;../../../docs/internal/audio-generation.md&amp;#96;\\n- **Implementation**: See [03-implementation.md](./03-implementation.md)\\n- **Multi-Platform Strategy**: See &amp;#96;../03-platforms/01-multi-platform-strategy.md&amp;#96;\\n- **Browser Optimization**: See &amp;#96;../03-platforms/02-browser-optimization-strategy.md&amp;#96;\","

                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 42179,
                  "content": "        \"contents\": \"2. **Implement on both platforms** - Mobile and Web simultaneously\\n3. **Test frequently** - after each change on both platforms\\n4. **Update changelog** - mark progress\\n5. **Document decisions** - note why choices were made\\n6. **Keep schemas coherent** - verify at each step\\n7. **Ensure consistency** - UI/UX consistent across platforms\\n\\n### After Completing a Step\\n\\n1. **Verify UI checkpoint** - see visible progress on both platforms\\n2. **Test functionality** - ensure it works on Mobile and Web\\n3. **Verify consistency** - UI/UX consistent across platforms\\n4. **Update changelog** - mark complete with date in &amp;#96;rebuild-roadmap/03-tracking/01-changelog.md&amp;#96;\\n5. **Update docs** - if needed\\n6. **Commit changes** - with descriptive message\\n\\n### When Re-Running a Step\\n\\n1. **Check changelog** - see what was done before in &amp;#96;rebuild-roadmap/03-tracking/01-changelog.md&amp;#96;\\n2. **Update changelog** - add new entry with date\\n3. **Note changes** - what  [... omitted end of long line]"
                },

                },

                  "content": "        \"contents\": \"**Tracking** (&amp;#96;03-tracking/&amp;#96;):\\n- &amp;#96;01-changelog.md&amp;#96; - Step completion tracking, updates, status\\n- &amp;#96;02-analysis-template.md&amp;#96; - Template for creating phase analysis documents\\n- &amp;#96;03-step-tracking.md&amp;#96; - Template for tracking individual steps\\n\\n### Using Context7 for Documentation\\n\\n**ALWAYS use Context7 when you need documentation information:**\\n\\n1. **For Product Understanding**:\\n   &amp;#96;&amp;#96;&amp;#96;\\n   Use Context7 to query: \\\"What are the three content types in waQup and how do they differ?\\\"\\n   Reference: ../../docs/internal/01-product-constitution.md\\n   &amp;#96;&amp;#96;&amp;#96;\\n\\n2. **For Scientific Backing**:\\n   &amp;#96;&amp;#96;&amp;#96;\\n   Use Context7 to query: \\\"What is the scientific foundation for voice-first design?\\\"\\n   Reference: ../../docs/internal/02-scientific-foundations.md\\n   &amp;#96;&amp;#96;&amp;#96;\\n\\n3. **For Technical Architecture**:\\n   &amp;#96;&amp;#96;&amp;#96;\\n   Use Context7 to query: \\\"How does the conversation system work?\\\"\\n   Refe [... omitted end of long line]"

                  "content": "        \"contents\": \"# Core Product Documentation Reference\\n\\n**Purpose**: Reference guide to main waQup product documentation and in-repo pipeline/summary docs\\n\\n**Location**: &amp;#96;../../docs/internal/&amp;#96; (main waQup project) — full detail in external docs\\n\\n---\\n\\n## In-Repo Pipeline &amp;amp; Summary Docs (this folder)\\n\\n| Doc | Purpose |\\n|-----|---------|\\n| [02-pipeline-affirmations.md](./02-pipeline-affirmations.md) | Affirmation creation steps (Intent → Script → Voice → Audio → Review) |\\n| [03-pipeline-meditations.md](./03-pipeline-meditations.md) | Meditation creation steps (+ Context) |\\n| [04-pipeline-rituals.md](./04-pipeline-rituals.md) | Ritual creation steps (+ Context, Personalization) |\\n| [05-pipelines-overview.md](./05-pipelines-overview.md) | Overview, shared Audio page, route map |\\n| [06-audio-generation-summary.md](./06-audio-generation-summary.md) | TTS (ElevenLabs), recording, Audio page spec |\\n| [07-marketplace-summary.md](./07-marketplace-summary.md) | Di [... omitted end of long line]"

                  "content": "        \"contents\": \"**Content**: Links to &amp;#96;../../docs/internal/&amp;#96;; pipeline specs (02–04), overview (05), audio (06), marketplace (07), LLM (08)  \\n**Scope**: Product constitution, scientific foundations, pipelines, audio, marketplace, conversation\\n\\n### 02-mobile/ - Mobile-Specific Docs\\n**Purpose**: Mobile app development documentation  \\n**Content**: Mobile-specific tech stack, architecture, implementation  \\n**Scope**: React Native, Expo, mobile patterns, mobile optimizations  \\n**Coherence**: ✅ Contains ONLY mobile-specific content\\n\\n### 03-platforms/ - Multi-Platform Strategy\\n**Purpose**: Cross-platform development strategies  \\n**Content**: Multi-platform strategy, browser optimization  \\n**Scope**: Mobile + Web, parallel development, browser strategies  \\n**Coherence**: ✅ Separated from mobile-specific docs\\n\\n### 04-reference/ - Reference Guides\\n**Purpose**: Reference documentation (SSOT)  \\n**Content**: Showcase access (Web URL, Mobile deep links)  \\n**Scope**: De [... omitted end of long line]"

                  "lineNumber": 8714,
                  "content": "        \"contents\": \"# Documentation Organization &amp;amp; Hierarchy\\n\\n**Purpose**: Overview of documentation structure, hierarchy, and coherence\\n\\n---\\n\\n## Complete Structure\\n\\n&amp;#96;&amp;#96;&amp;#96;\\ndocs/\\n├── README.md                    # Main documentation overview\\n│\\n├── 01-core/                    # Core product documentation (references + pipelines)\\n│   ├── README.md               # Reference guide to main docs\\n│   ├── 02-pipeline-affirmations.md\\n│   ├── 03-pipeline-meditations.md\\n│   ├── 04-pipeline-rituals.md\\n│   ├── 05-pipelines-overview.md\\n│   ├── 06-audio-generation-summary.md\\n│   ├── 07-marketplace-summary.md\\n│   └── 08-llm-conversation-summary.md\\n│\\n├── 02-mobile/                  # Mobile-specific documentation ONLY\\n│   ├── README.md               # Mobile docs overview\\n│   ├── 01-technology-stack.md  # Mobile tech stack &amp;amp; decisions\\n│   ├── 02-architecture.md      # Mobile architecture\\n│   └── 03-implementation.md    # Mobile implementation guide\\n│\\n├── 03 [... omitted end of long line]"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 8907,
                  "content": "            \"text\": \"**Content**: Links to &amp;#96;../../docs/internal/&amp;#96;; pipeline specs (02–04), overview (05), audio (06), marketplace (07), LLM (08)  \","
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 9826,
                  "content": "        \"contents\": \"- Apple Pay / Google Pay\\n- Secure (PCI compliant)\\n\\n---\\n\\n## Project Structure\\n\\n&amp;#96;&amp;#96;&amp;#96;\\nsrc/\\n├── app/              # App entry\\n├── screens/          # Screen components\\n├── components/       # Reusable components\\n│   ├── ui/          # UI primitives\\n│   └── features/    # Feature components\\n├── navigation/       # Navigation config\\n├── services/         # API services\\n│   ├── supabase/    # Supabase client\\n│   ├── api/         # API functions\\n│   └── storage/     # Storage functions\\n├── stores/           # Zustand stores\\n├── hooks/            # React Query hooks\\n├── types/            # TypeScript types\\n├── utils/            # Utilities\\n└── constants/        # Constants\\n&amp;#96;&amp;#96;&amp;#96;\\n\\n---\\n\\n## Key Patterns\\n\\n### Supabase Connection\\n&amp;#96;&amp;#96;&amp;#96;typescript\\nimport { createClient } from '@supabase/supabase-js';\\nimport AsyncStorage from '@react-native-async-storage/async-storage';\\n\\nexport const supabase = createClient(\\n  proce [... omitted end of long line]"
                },

                  "lineNumber": 10166,
                  "content": "            \"text\": \"- **Full Details**: See &amp;#96;../../../docs/internal/05-system-architecture.md&amp;#96;\","

                {
                  "lineNumber": 10827,
                  "content": "        \"contents\": \"# Platform Documentation\\n\\n**Purpose**: Multi-platform strategy and optimization guides for Mobile and Web platforms\\n\\n---\\n\\n## Structure\\n\\n&amp;#96;&amp;#96;&amp;#96;\\n03-platforms/\\n├── README.md                           # This file\\n├── 01-multi-platform-strategy.md       # Mobile + Web strategy\\n└── 02-browser-optimization-strategy.md # Chrome-first browser strategy\\n&amp;#96;&amp;#96;&amp;#96;\\n\\n---\\n\\n## Quick Navigation\\n\\n### 📱 Multi-Platform Strategy\\n- **[01 Multi-Platform Strategy](./01-multi-platform-strategy.md)** - Strategy for Mobile and Web platforms developed simultaneously\\n\\n### 🌐 Browser Optimization\\n- **[02 Browser Optimization Strategy](./02-browser-optimization-strategy.md)** - Chrome-first browser optimization strategy\\n\\n---\\n\\n## Documentation Hierarchy\\n\\n### Mobile-Specific Docs\\nSee &amp;#96;../02-mobile/&amp;#96; for:\\n- Technology Stack (mobile)\\n- Architecture (mobile)\\n- Implementation (mobile)\\n\\n### Platform Strategy Docs\\nThis folder (&amp;#96;03-platforms/&amp; [... omitted end of long line]"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 11023,
                  "content": "            \"text\": \"4. **For Product Context**: See &amp;#96;../01-core/&amp;#96; → &amp;#96;../../docs/internal/&amp;#96;\","
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 11944,
                  "content": "        \"contents\": \"3. Implement same feature on Platform C (Web)\\n4. Test all three platforms simultaneously\\n5. Fix inconsistencies\\n6. Verify quality standards met on all platforms\\n\\n**Before Release**:\\n- Manual QA on all platforms simultaneously\\n- Performance benchmarking across platforms\\n- Cross-platform consistency verification\\n- User acceptance testing on all platforms\\n- Beta testing program (all platforms)\\n\\n**Post-Release**:\\n- Crash monitoring (Sentry) for all platforms\\n- Performance monitoring across platforms\\n- User feedback collection (platform-specific)\\n- A/B testing (future, all platforms)\\n\\n---\\n\\n## References\\n\\n- [Mobile Technology Stack](../02-mobile/01-technology-stack.md)\\n- [Mobile Architecture](../02-mobile/02-architecture.md)\\n- [Mobile Implementation](../02-mobile/03-implementation.md)\\n- [Browser Optimization Strategy](./02-browser-optimization-strategy.md)\\n- [Marketplace Platform](../../../docs/internal/marketplace-platform.md)\\n- [Undocumented  [... omitted end of long line]"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 12047,
                  "content": "            \"text\": \"- [Marketplace Platform](../../../docs/internal/marketplace-platform.md)\","
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 12051,
                  "content": "            \"text\": \"- [Undocumented Features](../../../docs/internal/undocumented-features.md)\","
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 13746,
                  "content": "        \"contents\": \"- Handle interruptions gracefully\\n- Cache audio files locally\\n- Stream from CDN\\n\\n### Performance\\n- Lazy load screens\\n- Optimize images\\n- Code splitting\\n- Memoization\\n\\n---\\n\\n## Integration Points\\n\\n### Supabase\\n- **Database**: PostgreSQL queries\\n- **Auth**: Supabase Auth v2 with PKCE\\n- **Storage**: Audio file upload/download\\n- **Realtime**: Live updates\\n\\n### External APIs\\n- **ElevenLabs**: Voice cloning, TTS\\n- **OpenAI**: Conversations, script generation\\n- **Stripe**: Payments, subscriptions\\n\\n---\\n\\n## Security\\n\\n- Supabase Auth v2 with PKCE\\n- Secure token storage (Keychain/Keystore)\\n- HTTPS only\\n- RLS policies\\n- GDPR compliant\\n\\n---\\n\\n## Performance Targets\\n\\n- App launch: &amp;lt; 2s\\n- Screen transition: &amp;lt; 300ms\\n- API response: &amp;lt; 500ms\\n- Audio playback start: &amp;lt; 1s\\n- Bundle size: &amp;lt; 50MB\\n\\n---\\n\\n## References\\n\\n- **Full Architecture**: See &amp;#96;../../../docs/internal/05-system-architecture.md&amp;#96;\\n- **Implementation**:  [... omitted end of long line]"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 13932,
                  "content": "            \"text\": \"- **Full Architecture**: See &amp;#96;../../../docs/internal/05-system-architecture.md&amp;#96;\","
                }
              ]
            },

                  "lineNumber": 706,
                  "content": "        \"contents\": \"# Documentation Organization &amp;amp; Hierarchy\\n\\n**Purpose**: Overview of documentation structure, hierarchy, and coherence\\n\\n---\\n\\n## Complete Structure\\n\\n&amp;#96;&amp;#96;&amp;#96;\\ndocs/\\n├── README.md                    # Main documentation overview\\n│\\n├── 01-core/                    # Core product documentation (references)\\n│   └── README.md               # Reference guide to main docs\\n│\\n├── 02-mobile/                  # Mobile-specific documentation ONLY\\n│   ├── README.md               # Mobile docs overview\\n│   ├── 01-technology-stack.md  # Mobile tech stack &amp;amp; decisions\\n│   ├── 02-architecture.md      # Mobile architecture\\n│   └── 03-implementation.md    # Mobile implementation guide\\n│\\n├── 03-platforms/               # Multi-platform strategy &amp;amp; optimization\\n│   ├── README.md               # Platform docs overview\\n│   ├── 01-multi-platform-strategy.md  # Mobile + Web strategy\\n│   └── 02-browser-optimization-strategy.md  # Chrome-first browser stra [... omitted end of long line]"

                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 915,
                  "content": "        \"contents\": \"- **Loading states** - show loading indicators during async operations\\n- **Empty states** - beautiful empty states for all screens\\n- **Performance optimized** - follow performance targets\\n\\n### 5. Multi-Platform Parallel Development\\n- **Both platforms developed simultaneously** - Mobile and Web in parallel\\n- **Shared codebase** - Business logic in &amp;#96;packages/shared/&amp;#96;\\n- **Platform-specific UI** - UI components in each platform folder\\n- **Test simultaneously** - Test both platforms together\\n- **Consistency** - Ensure UI/UX consistency across platforms\\n- **Web as Desktop** - Web app serves desktop users via browsers (PWA support)\\n\\n### 6. Mobile-First Design (Mobile Platform)\\n- **Optimize for mobile screens** - not desktop\\n- **Touch-friendly** - proper touch targets (44x44pt minimum)\\n- **Background audio** - support background playback\\n- **Offline support** - cache data for offline access\\n- **Native feel** - use native components and patterns\\n\\n [... omitted end of long line]"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1070,
                  "content": "            \"text\": \"#### 1. Core Product Docs (&amp;#96;../../docs/internal/&amp;#96;)\","

                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1111,
                  "content": "        \"contents\": \"**Tracking** (&amp;#96;03-tracking/&amp;#96;):\\n- &amp;#96;01-changelog.md&amp;#96; - Step completion tracking, updates, status\\n- &amp;#96;02-analysis-template.md&amp;#96; - Template for creating phase analysis documents\\n- &amp;#96;03-step-tracking.md&amp;#96; - Template for tracking individual steps\\n\\n### Using Context7 for Documentation\\n\\n**ALWAYS use Context7 when you need documentation information:**\\n\\n1. **For Product Understanding**:\\n   &amp;#96;&amp;#96;&amp;#96;\\n   Use Context7 to query: \\\"What are the three content types in waQup and how do they differ?\\\"\\n   Reference: ../../docs/internal/01-product-constitution.md\\n   &amp;#96;&amp;#96;&amp;#96;\\n\\n2. **For Scientific Backing**:\\n   &amp;#96;&amp;#96;&amp;#96;\\n   Use Context7 to query: \\\"What is the scientific foundation for voice-first design?\\\"\\n   Reference: ../../docs/internal/02-scientific-foundations.md\\n   &amp;#96;&amp;#96;&amp;#96;\\n\\n3. **For Technical Architecture**:\\n   &amp;#96;&amp;#96;&amp;#96;\\n   Use Context7 to query: \\\"How does the conversation system work?\\\"\\n   Refe [... omitted end of long line]"

                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1746,
                  "content": "        \"contents\": \"- **Status**: ✅ Complete (or ⏳ Pending)\\n- **Completed**: YYYY-MM-DD\\n- **Notes**: What was done\\n- **Updated**: YYYY-MM-DD\\n&amp;#96;&amp;#96;&amp;#96;\\n\\n---\\n\\n## File Naming Conventions\\n\\n### Components\\n- **PascalCase**: &amp;#96;Button.tsx&amp;#96;, &amp;#96;AudioPlayer.tsx&amp;#96;\\n- **Screens**: &amp;#96;*Screen.tsx&amp;#96; suffix\\n- **Hooks**: &amp;#96;use*&amp;#96; prefix\\n\\n### Files\\n- **kebab-case**: &amp;#96;audio-service.ts&amp;#96;, &amp;#96;content-api.ts&amp;#96;\\n- **Types**: &amp;#96;*.types.ts&amp;#96; or in &amp;#96;types/&amp;#96; folder\\n- **Numbered docs**: &amp;#96;01-name.md&amp;#96;, &amp;#96;02-name.md&amp;#96; (for ordered docs)\\n\\n### Folders\\n- **kebab-case**: &amp;#96;api-services/&amp;#96;\\n- **Numbered**: &amp;#96;01-core/&amp;#96;, &amp;#96;02-mobile/&amp;#96; (for ordered folders)\\n\\n---\\n\\n## Git Workflow\\n\\n### Commits\\n- **Descriptive messages** - what and why\\n- **Reference steps** - mention step number\\n- **Update changelog** - in same commit\\n\\n### Branches\\n- **main** - production-ready code\\n- **feature/*** - new features\\n- **fix/ [... omitted end of long line]"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1957,
                  "content": "            \"text\": \"9. **Product Constitution**: &amp;#96;../../docs/internal/01-product-constitution.md&amp;#96; - Core principles\","

                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1981,
                  "content": "        \"contents\": \"# waQup Mobile App - Cursor Rules\\n\\n## Project Context\\n\\nThis is the **waQup multi-platform rebuild** - building Mobile (React Native + Expo for Android/iOS) and Web (Next.js for desktop browsers) apps **simultaneously from scratch**. This is the **main development repository** for the new waQup platform.\\n\\n**Location**: &amp;#96;waqup-app/waqup-new/&amp;#96; (this is the active development repo)\\n**Strategy**: **Parallel Development** - Mobile and Web platforms developed simultaneously\\n**Tech Stack**: \\n- **Mobile**: React Native + Expo SDK 54 + TypeScript 5.9.3 (Android + iOS)\\n- **Web**: Next.js 16.1.6 + TypeScript 5.9.3 (Desktop browsers - Chrome-first)\\n- **Shared**: Supabase backend (same as web app)\\n**Goal**: Production-ready apps for iOS, Android, and Web browsers (Chrome-first, PWA support)\\n\\n---\\n\\n## Core Principles\\n\\n### 1. Step-by-Step Verification\\n- **Each step must be independently testable**\\n- **Clear UI checkpoints at each step** - visible progres [... omitted end of long line]"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2109,
                  "content": "            \"text\": \"- **Reference scientific foundations** from &amp;#96;../../docs/internal/02-scientific-foundations.md&amp;#96;\","
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2113,
                  "content": "            \"text\": \"- **Follow product constitution** from &amp;#96;../../docs/internal/01-product-constitution.md&amp;#96;\","
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2422,
                  "content": "        \"contents\": \"---\\n\\n## How to Use\\n\\n1. **For Mobile Development**: \\n   - Tech Stack: &amp;#96;02-mobile/01-technology-stack.md&amp;#96;\\n   - Architecture: &amp;#96;02-mobile/02-architecture.md&amp;#96;\\n   - Implementation: &amp;#96;02-mobile/03-implementation.md&amp;#96;\\n\\n2. **For Multi-Platform Strategy**: \\n   - Platform Strategy: &amp;#96;03-platforms/01-multi-platform-strategy.md&amp;#96;\\n   - Browser Optimization: &amp;#96;03-platforms/02-browser-optimization-strategy.md&amp;#96;\\n\\n3. **For Reference Guides**: \\n   - Showcase access: &amp;#96;04-reference/01-showcase-access.md&amp;#96;\\n\\n4. **For Product Context**: See &amp;#96;01-core/README.md&amp;#96; → &amp;#96;../../docs/internal/&amp;#96;\\n\\n---\\n\\n## Roadmap &amp;amp; Planning\\n\\nSee &amp;#96;../rebuild-roadmap/&amp;#96; for:\\n- Complete roadmap\\n- Schema verification\\n- Phase analyses\\n- Changelog tracking\\n\\n---\\n\\n**Last Updated**: 2026-02-07\","
                },

                {
                  "lineNumber": 2860,
                  "content": "        \"contents\": \"# Platform Documentation\\n\\n**Purpose**: Multi-platform strategy and optimization guides for Mobile and Web platforms\\n\\n---\\n\\n## Structure\\n\\n&amp;#96;&amp;#96;&amp;#96;\\n03-platforms/\\n├── README.md                           # This file\\n├── 01-multi-platform-strategy.md       # Mobile + Web strategy\\n└── 02-browser-optimization-strategy.md # Chrome-first browser strategy\\n&amp;#96;&amp;#96;&amp;#96;\\n\\n---\\n\\n## Quick Navigation\\n\\n### 📱 Multi-Platform Strategy\\n- **[01 Multi-Platform Strategy](./01-multi-platform-strategy.md)** - Strategy for Mobile and Web platforms developed simultaneously\\n\\n### 🌐 Browser Optimization\\n- **[02 Browser Optimization Strategy](./02-browser-optimization-strategy.md)** - Chrome-first browser optimization strategy\\n\\n---\\n\\n## Documentation Hierarchy\\n\\n### Mobile-Specific Docs\\nSee &amp;#96;../02-mobile/&amp;#96; for:\\n- Technology Stack (mobile)\\n- Architecture (mobile)\\n- Implementation (mobile)\\n\\n### Platform Strategy Docs\\nThis folder (&amp;#96;03-platforms/&amp; [... omitted end of long line]"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 3056,
                  "content": "            \"text\": \"4. **For Product Context**: See &amp;#96;../01-core/&amp;#96; → &amp;#96;../../docs/internal/&amp;#96;\","
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 3088,
                  "content": "        \"contents\": \"## Using Context7\\n\\n**Recommended**: Use Context7 to query these docs\\n\\n**Example**:\\n&amp;#96;&amp;#96;&amp;#96;\\nContext7 Query: \\\"What are the three content types in waQup?\\\"\\nReference: ../../docs/internal/01-product-constitution.md\\n&amp;#96;&amp;#96;&amp;#96;\\n\\nSee &amp;#96;../03-reference/01-context7-usage.md&amp;#96; for detailed guide.\\n\\n---\\n\\n**Purpose**: Reference only - main docs stay in &amp;#96;../../docs/internal/&amp;#96;\","
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 3118,
                  "content": "            \"text\": \"Reference: ../../docs/internal/01-product-constitution.md\","
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 3143,
                  "content": "            \"text\": \"**Purpose**: Reference only - main docs stay in &amp;#96;../../docs/internal/&amp;#96;\","
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 3161,
                  "content": "        \"contents\": \"2. **Implement on both platforms** - Mobile and Web simultaneously\\n3. **Test frequently** - after each change on both platforms\\n4. **Update changelog** - mark progress\\n5. **Document decisions** - note why choices were made\\n6. **Keep schemas coherent** - verify at each step\\n7. **Ensure consistency** - UI/UX consistent across platforms\\n\\n### After Completing a Step\\n\\n1. **Verify UI checkpoint** - see visible progress on both platforms\\n2. **Test functionality** - ensure it works on Mobile and Web\\n3. **Verify consistency** - UI/UX consistent across platforms\\n4. **Update changelog** - mark complete with date in &amp;#96;rebuild-roadmap/03-tracking/01-changelog.md&amp;#96;\\n5. **Update docs** - if needed\\n6. **Commit changes** - with descriptive message\\n\\n### When Re-Running a Step\\n\\n1. **Check changelog** - see what was done before in &amp;#96;rebuild-roadmap/03-tracking/01-changelog.md&amp;#96;\\n2. **Update changelog** - add new entry with date\\n3. **Note changes** - what  [... omitted end of long line]"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 3312,
                  "content": "            \"text\": \"**Reference**: Use Context7 to query &amp;#96;../../docs/internal/01-product-constitution.md&amp;#96;\","
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 3919,
                  "content": "        \"contents\": \"# Phase 0: Research &amp;amp; Planning - Detailed Analysis\\n\\n## Overview\\n**Goal**: Validate technology choices, gather best practices, and establish scientific foundations for the mobile app rebuild\\n**Status**: ✅ Complete → Ready for Phase 1\\n**Dependencies**: None (starting point)\\n\\n## Changelog\\n\\n### 2026-02-07 - Initial Analysis Created\\n- **Status**: 📝 Analysis Complete\\n- **Notes**: Research phase completed, technology stack finalized, documentation created\\n- **Next**: Begin Phase 1 (Project Foundation)\\n\\n---\\n\\n## Current State Analysis (NOW)\\n\\n### Current Implementation\\n**Location**: Documentation and research phase (no code yet)\\n\\n**What Exists**:\\n- ✅ Technology stack research completed\\n- ✅ Scientific foundations documented\\n- ✅ App store requirements reviewed\\n- ✅ Architecture decisions made\\n- ✅ Implementation patterns researched\\n\\n**Current Documentation**:\\n- &amp;#96;docs/02-mobile/01-technology-stack.md&amp;#96; - Finalized tech stack\\n- &amp;#96;docs/02 [... omitted end of long line]"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 4047,
                  "content": "            \"text\": \"- &amp;#96;../../docs/internal/&amp;#96; - Complete product documentation\","
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 5084,
                  "content": "        \"contents\": \"- Handle interruptions gracefully\\n- Cache audio files locally\\n- Stream from CDN\\n\\n### Performance\\n- Lazy load screens\\n- Optimize images\\n- Code splitting\\n- Memoization\\n\\n---\\n\\n## Integration Points\\n\\n### Supabase\\n- **Database**: PostgreSQL queries\\n- **Auth**: Supabase Auth v2 with PKCE\\n- **Storage**: Audio file upload/download\\n- **Realtime**: Live updates\\n\\n### External APIs\\n- **ElevenLabs**: Voice cloning, TTS\\n- **OpenAI**: Conversations, script generation\\n- **Stripe**: Payments, subscriptions\\n\\n---\\n\\n## Security\\n\\n- Supabase Auth v2 with PKCE\\n- Secure token storage (Keychain/Keystore)\\n- HTTPS only\\n- RLS policies\\n- GDPR compliant\\n\\n---\\n\\n## Performance Targets\\n\\n- App launch: &amp;lt; 2s\\n- Screen transition: &amp;lt; 300ms\\n- API response: &amp;lt; 500ms\\n- Audio playback start: &amp;lt; 1s\\n- Bundle size: &amp;lt; 50MB\\n\\n---\\n\\n## References\\n\\n- **Full Architecture**: See &amp;#96;../../../docs/internal/05-system-architecture.md&amp;#96;\\n- **Implementation**:  [... omitted end of long line]"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 5270,
                  "content": "            \"text\": \"- **Full Architecture**: See &amp;#96;../../../docs/internal/05-system-architecture.md&amp;#96;\","
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 5296,
                  "content": "        \"contents\": \"- **When verifying**: Use Context7 to check requirements\\n- **When documenting**: Use Context7 to reference existing patterns\\n\\n### Documentation Access Strategy\\n\\n1. **Primary**: Use Context7 to query docs (fastest, most accurate)\\n2. **Secondary**: Read files directly if Context7 unavailable\\n3. **Reference**: Use &amp;#96;../../docs/internal/&amp;#96; for full context\\n4. **Mobile**: Use &amp;#96;docs/02-mobile/&amp;#96; for mobile-specific information\\n\\n### When Creating New Docs\\n\\n- **Use Context7 first** - query existing docs for patterns\\n- **Reference existing docs** - adapt from &amp;#96;../../docs/&amp;#96;\\n- **Follow numbering** - use numbered format (01-, 02-, etc.)\\n- **Keep structure consistent** - follow existing patterns\\n- **Update changelog** - document what was created\\n- **Link from README** - add to appropriate README\\n\\n---\\n\\n## Technology Stack (Finalized)\\n\\n### Core\\n- **Framework**: React Native + Expo SDK 54 (Mobile: Android + iOS)\\n- **Language**: TypeScr [... omitted end of long line]"
                },

                  "content": "        \"contents\": \"# waQup Mobile App - Cursor Rules\\n\\n## Project Context\\n\\nThis is the **waQup multi-platform rebuild** - building Mobile (React Native + Expo for Android/iOS) and Web (Next.js for desktop browsers) apps **simultaneously from scratch**.                   "lineNumber": 22135,
                  "content": "  \"plan\": \"# Documentation Full Coherence Update\\n\\n## 1. Pipeline docs (one MD per content type)\\n\\nCreate three pipeline spec files in &amp;#96;docs/01-core/&amp;#96;, grounded in the scientific foundations you provided:\\n\\n### 1.1 &amp;#96;docs/01-core/02-pipeline-affirmations.md&amp;#96;\\n\\n**Purpose**: Exact steps for affirmation creation. Scientific basis: cognitive re-patterning, repetition, positive language, believability, emotion, **own voice** (Research principle 13).\\n\\n**Steps** (conversational, chat-like, no static forms):\\n\\n| Step | Purpose | Inputs | Outputs | LLM/TTS? |\\n|------|---------|--------|---------|----------|\\n| 1. Intent | User articulates what they want to change/strengthen | Conversation | intent (string, structured) | LLM clarifies |\\n| 2. Script | Generate affirmations: positive, present-tense, believable, gradual | intent | script (text) | LLM (GPT-4) |\\n| 3. Voice | Choose: user record own voice OR ElevenLabs TTS | script, choice | audio_url | Recording or ElevenLabs [... omitted end of long line]"
                },

                },

                }

                {
                  "lineNumber": 35669,
                  "content": "        \"contents\": \"# Core Product Documentation Reference\\n\\n**Purpose**: Reference guide to main waQup product documentation\\n\\n**Location**: &amp;#96;../../docs/internal/&amp;#96; (main waQup project)\\n\\n---\\n\\n## How to Access\\n\\n**Direct Access**: &amp;#96;../../docs/internal/&amp;#96;  \\n**Use Context7**: Query docs using Context7 (recommended)\\n\\n---\\n\\n## Complete Documentation List\\n\\n### Core Documents (01-07)\\n\\n1. **01-product-constitution.md**\\n   - Core identity, principles, boundaries\\n   - Three content types definition\\n   - Voice-first design principles\\n\\n2. **02-scientific-foundations.md**\\n   - Scientific backing and research\\n   - Neuroplasticity, subconscious mind\\n   - Voice prosody effects\\n\\n3. **03-conversational-system.md**\\n   - Conversation flows\\n   - Content types (affirmations, meditations, rituals)\\n   - State machine\\n\\n4. **04-ai-voice-ethics.md**\\n   - AI voice guidelines\\n   - Ethical boundaries\\n   - Privacy principles\\n\\n5. **05-system-architecture.md**\\n   - C [... omitted end of long line]"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 35687,
                  "content": "            \"text\": \"**Location**: &amp;#96;../../docs/internal/&amp;#96; (main waQup project)\","
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 35708,
                  "content": "            \"text\": \"**Direct Access**: &amp;#96;../../docs/internal/&amp;#96;  \","
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 36467,
                  "content": "        \"contents\": \"---\\n\\n## How to Use\\n\\n1. **For Mobile Development**: \\n   - Tech Stack: &amp;#96;02-mobile/01-technology-stack.md&amp;#96;\\n   - Architecture: &amp;#96;02-mobile/02-architecture.md&amp;#96;\\n   - Implementation: &amp;#96;02-mobile/03-implementation.md&amp;#96;\\n\\n2. **For Multi-Platform Strategy**: \\n   - Platform Strategy: &amp;#96;03-platforms/01-multi-platform-strategy.md&amp;#96;\\n   - Browser Optimization: &amp;#96;03-platforms/02-browser-optimization-strategy.md&amp;#96;\\n\\n3. **For Reference Guides**: \\n   - Showcase access: &amp;#96;04-reference/01-showcase-access.md&amp;#96;\\n\\n4. **For Product Context**: See &amp;#96;01-core/README.md&amp;#96; → &amp;#96;../../docs/internal/&amp;#96;\\n\\n---\\n\\n## Roadmap &amp;amp; Planning\\n\\nSee &amp;#96;../rebuild-roadmap/&amp;#96; for:\\n- Complete roadmap\\n- Schema verification\\n- Phase analyses\\n- Changelog tracking\\n\\n---\\n\\n**Last Updated**: 2026-02-07\","
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 36530,
                  "content": "            \"text\": \"4. **For Product Context**: See &amp;#96;01-core/README.md&amp;#96; → &amp;#96;../../docs/internal/&amp;#96;\","
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 36597,
                  "content": "        \"contents\": \"# Documentation Organization &amp;amp; Hierarchy\\n\\n**Purpose**: Overview of documentation structure, hierarchy, and coherence\\n\\n---\\n\\n## Complete Structure\\n\\n&amp;#96;&amp;#96;&amp;#96;\\ndocs/\\n├── README.md                    # Main documentation overview\\n│\\n├── 01-core/                    # Core product documentation (references)\\n│   └── README.md               # Reference guide to main docs\\n│\\n├── 02-mobile/                  # Mobile-specific documentation ONLY\\n│   ├── README.md               # Mobile docs overview\\n│   ├── 01-technology-stack.md  # Mobile tech stack &amp;amp; decisions\\n│   ├── 02-architecture.md      # Mobile architecture\\n│   └── 03-implementation.md    # Mobile implementation guide\\n│\\n├── 03-platforms/               # Multi-platform strategy &amp;amp; optimization\\n│   ├── README.md               # Platform docs overview\\n│   ├── 01-multi-platform-strategy.md  # Mobile + Web strategy\\n│   └── 02-browser-optimization-strategy.md  # Chrome-first browser stra [... omitted end of long line]"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 36738,
                  "content": "            \"text\": \"**Content**: Links and references to &amp;#96;../../docs/internal/&amp;#96;  \","
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 37260,
                  "content": "        \"contents\": \"# Platform Documentation\\n\\n**Purpose**: Multi-platform strategy and optimization guides for Mobile and Web platforms\\n\\n---\\n\\n## Structure\\n\\n&amp;#96;&amp;#96;&amp;#96;\\n03-platforms/\\n├── README.md                           # This file\\n├── 01-multi-platform-strategy.md       # Mobile + Web strategy\\n└── 02-browser-optimization-strategy.md # Chrome-first browser strategy\\n&amp;#96;&amp;#96;&amp;#96;\\n\\n---\\n\\n## Quick Navigation\\n\\n### 📱 Multi-Platform Strategy\\n- **[01 Multi-Platform Strategy](./01-multi-platform-strategy.md)** - Strategy for Mobile and Web platforms developed simultaneously\\n\\n### 🌐 Browser Optimization\\n- **[02 Browser Optimization Strategy](./02-browser-optimization-strategy.md)** - Chrome-first browser optimization strategy\\n\\n---\\n\\n## Documentation Hierarchy\\n\\n### Mobile-Specific Docs\\nSee &amp;#96;../02-mobile/&amp;#96; for:\\n- Technology Stack (mobile)\\n- Architecture (mobile)\\n- Implementation (mobile)\\n\\n### Platform Strategy Docs\\nThis folder (&amp;#96;03-platforms/&amp; [... omitted end of long line]"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 37456,
                  "content": "            \"text\": \"4. **For Product Context**: See &amp;#96;../01-core/&amp;#96; → &amp;#96;../../docs/internal/&amp;#96;\","
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 37800,
                  "content": "        \"contents\": \"- Apple Pay / Google Pay\\n- Secure (PCI compliant)\\n\\n---\\n\\n## Project Structure\\n\\n&amp;#96;&amp;#96;&amp;#96;\\nsrc/\\n├── app/              # App entry\\n├── screens/          # Screen components\\n├── components/       # Reusable components\\n│   ├── ui/          # UI primitives\\n│   └── features/    # Feature components\\n├── navigation/       # Navigation config\\n├── services/         # API services\\n│   ├── supabase/    # Supabase client\\n│   ├── api/         # API functions\\n│   └── storage/     # Storage functions\\n├── stores/           # Zustand stores\\n├── hooks/            # React Query hooks\\n├── types/            # TypeScript types\\n├── utils/            # Utilities\\n└── constants/        # Constants\\n&amp;#96;&amp;#96;&amp;#96;\\n\\n---\\n\\n## Key Patterns\\n\\n### Supabase Connection\\n&amp;#96;&amp;#96;&amp;#96;typescript\\nimport { createClient } from '@supabase/supabase-js';\\nimport AsyncStorage from '@react-native-async-storage/async-storage';\\n\\nexport const supabase = createClient(\\n  proce [... omitted end of long line]"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 38140,
                  "content": "            \"text\": \"- **Full Details**: See &amp;#96;../../../docs/internal/05-system-architecture.md&amp;#96;\","
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 38144,
                  "content": "            \"text\": \"- **Audio Details**: See &amp;#96;../../../docs/internal/audio-generation.md&amp;#96;\","
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 40268,
                  "content": "        \"contents\": \"- Handle interruptions gracefully\\n- Cache audio files locally\\n- Stream from CDN\\n\\n### Performance\\n- Lazy load screens\\n- Optimize images\\n- Code splitting\\n- Memoization\\n\\n---\\n\\n## Integration Points\\n\\n### Supabase\\n- **Database**: PostgreSQL queries\\n- **Auth**: Supabase Auth v2 with PKCE\\n- **Storage**: Audio file upload/download\\n- **Realtime**: Live updates\\n\\n### External APIs\\n- **ElevenLabs**: Voice cloning, TTS\\n- **OpenAI**: Conversations, script generation\\n- **Stripe**: Payments, subscriptions\\n\\n---\\n\\n## Security\\n\\n- Supabase Auth v2 with PKCE\\n- Secure token storage (Keychain/Keystore)\\n- HTTPS only\\n- RLS policies\\n- GDPR compliant\\n\\n---\\n\\n## Performance Targets\\n\\n- App launch: &amp;lt; 2s\\n- Screen transition: &amp;lt; 300ms\\n- API response: &amp;lt; 500ms\\n- Audio playback start: &amp;lt; 1s\\n- Bundle size: &amp;lt; 50MB\\n\\n---\\n\\n## References\\n\\n- **Full Architecture**: See &amp;#96;../../../docs/internal/05-system-architecture.md&amp;#96;\\n- **Implementation**:  [... omitted end of long line]"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 40454,
                  "content": "            \"text\": \"- **Full Architecture**: See &amp;#96;../../../docs/internal/05-system-architecture.md&amp;#96;\","
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 40480,
                  "content": "        \"contents\": \"3. Implement same feature on Platform C (Web)\\n4. Test all three platforms simultaneously\\n5. Fix inconsistencies\\n6. Verify quality standards met on all platforms\\n\\n**Before Release**:\\n- Manual QA on all platforms simultaneously\\n- Performance benchmarking across platforms\\n- Cross-platform consistency verification\\n- User acceptance testing on all platforms\\n- Beta testing program (all platforms)\\n\\n**Post-Release**:\\n- Crash monitoring (Sentry) for all platforms\\n- Performance monitoring across platforms\\n- User feedback collection (platform-specific)\\n- A/B testing (future, all platforms)\\n\\n---\\n\\n## References\\n\\n- [Mobile Technology Stack](../02-mobile/01-technology-stack.md)\\n- [Mobile Architecture](../02-mobile/02-architecture.md)\\n- [Mobile Implementation](../02-mobile/03-implementation.md)\\n- [Browser Optimization Strategy](./02-browser-optimization-strategy.md)\\n- [Marketplace Platform](../../../docs/internal/marketplace-platform.md)\\n- [Undocumented  [... omitted end of long line]"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 40583,
                  "content": "            \"text\": \"- [Marketplace Platform](../../../docs/internal/marketplace-platform.md)\","
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 40587,
                  "content": "            \"text\": \"- [Undocumented Features](../../../docs/internal/undocumented-features.md)\","
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 40623,
                  "content": "        \"contents\": \"- **Full Details**: See &amp;#96;../../../docs/internal/05-system-architecture.md&amp;#96;\\n- **Audio Details**: See &amp;#96;../../../docs/internal/audio-generation.md&amp;#96;\\n- **Implementation**: See [03-implementation.md](./03-implementation.md)\\n- **Multi-Platform Strategy**: See &amp;#96;../03-platforms/01-multi-platform-strategy.md&amp;#96;\\n- **Browser Optimization**: See &amp;#96;../03-platforms/02-browser-optimization-strategy.md&amp;#96;\","
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 40627,
                  "content": "            \"text\": \"- **Full Details**: See &amp;#96;../../../docs/internal/05-system-architecture.md&amp;#96;\","
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 40631,
                  "content": "            \"text\": \"- **Audio Details**: See &amp;#96;../../../docs/internal/audio-generation.md&amp;#96;\","
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 42179,
                  "content": "        \"contents\": \"2. **Implement on both platforms** - Mobile and Web simultaneously\\n3. **Test frequently** - after each change on both platforms\\n4. **Update changelog** - mark progress\\n5. **Document decisions** - note why choices were made\\n6. **Keep schemas coherent** - verify at each step\\n7. **Ensure consistency** - UI/UX consistent across platforms\\n\\n### After Completing a Step\\n\\n1. **Verify UI checkpoint** - see visible progress on both platforms\\n2. **Test functionality** - ensure it works on Mobile and Web\\n3. **Verify consistency** - UI/UX consistent across platforms\\n4. **Update changelog** - mark complete with date in &amp;#96;rebuild-roadmap/03-tracking/01-changelog.md&amp;#96;\\n5. **Update docs** - if needed\\n6. **Commit changes** - with descriptive message\\n\\n### When Re-Running a Step\\n\\n1. **Check changelog** - see what was done before in &amp;#96;rebuild-roadmap/03-tracking/01-changelog.md&amp;#96;\\n2. **Update changelog** - add new entry with date\\n3. **Note changes** - what  [... omitted end of long line]"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 42330,
                  "content": "            \"text\": \"**Reference**: Use Context7 to query &amp;#96;../../docs/internal/01-product-constitution.md&amp;#96;\","
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 45143,
                  "content": "        \"contents\": \"# Core Product Documentation Reference\\n\\n**Purpose**: Reference guide to main waQup product documentation\\n\\n**Location**: &amp;#96;../../docs/internal/&amp;#96; (main waQup project)\\n\\n---\\n\\n## How to Access\\n\\n**Direct Access**: &amp;#96;../../docs/internal/&amp;#96;  \\n**Use Context7**: Query docs using Context7 (recommended)\\n\\n---\\n\\n## Complete Documentation List\\n\\n### Core Documents (01-07)\\n\\n1. **01-product-constitution.md**\\n   - Core identity, principles, boundaries\\n   - Three content types definition\\n   - Voice-first design principles\\n\\n2. **02-scientific-foundations.md**\\n   - Scientific backing and research\\n   - Neuroplasticity, subconscious mind\\n   - Voice prosody effects\\n\\n3. **03-conversational-system.md**\\n   - Conversation flows\\n   - Content types (affirmations, meditations, rituals)\\n   - State machine\\n\\n4. **04-ai-voice-ethics.md**\\n   - AI voice guidelines\\n   - Ethical boundaries\\n   - Privacy principles\\n\\n5. **05-system-architecture.md**\\n   - C [... omitted end of long line]"

                {
                  "lineNumber": 47476,
                  "content": "        \"contents\": \"**Tracking** (&amp;#96;03-tracking/&amp;#96;):\\n- &amp;#96;01-changelog.md&amp;#96; - Step completion tracking, updates, status\\n- &amp;#96;02-analysis-template.md&amp;#96; - Template for creating phase analysis documents\\n- &amp;#96;03-step-tracking.md&amp;#96; - Template for tracking individual steps\\n\\n### Using Context7 for Documentation\\n\\n**ALWAYS use Context7 when you need documentation information:**\\n\\n1. **For Product Understanding**:\\n   &amp;#96;&amp;#96;&amp;#96;\\n   Use Context7 to query: \\\"What are the three content types in waQup and how do they differ?\\\"\\n   Reference: ../../docs/internal/01-product-constitution.md\\n   &amp;#96;&amp;#96;&amp;#96;\\n\\n2. **For Scientific Backing**:\\n   &amp;#96;&amp;#96;&amp;#96;\\n   Use Context7 to query: \\\"What is the scientific foundation for voice-first design?\\\"\\n   Reference: ../../docs/internal/02-scientific-foundations.md\\n   &amp;#96;&amp;#96;&amp;#96;\\n\\n3. **For Technical Architecture**:\\n   &amp;#96;&amp;#96;&amp;#96;\\n   Use Context7 to query: \\\"How does the conversation system work?\\\"\\n   Refe [... omitted end of long line]"

                  "lineNumber": 47979,
                  "content": "The main product docs (flows, conversational system, marketplace, voice interaction) are in &#96;../../docs/internal/&#96; - i.e. outside this repo (main waQup project). This repo's docs point to them via 01-core/README. I need to search within this repo for:"

The 01-core/README points to ../../docs/internal/ for flows.md, voice-interaction-design.md, marketplace-platform.md, 03-conversational-system.md. Those aren't in this repo. So I'll work from:"

                },

                  "lineNumber": 49616,
                  "content": "The **main product docs** (flows, conversational system, voice interaction, marketplace) are in the **parent project** at &#96;../../docs/internal/&#96;. If something in &#96;docs/internal/&#96; contradicts the comparison, that doc is the place to update after you run Context7."
                }

                  "lineNumber": 11944,
                  "content": "        \"contents\": \"3. Implement same feature on Platform C (Web)\\n4. Test all three platforms simultaneously\\n5. Fix inconsistencies\\n6. Verify quality standards met on all platforms\\n\\n**Before Release**:\\n- Manual QA on all platforms simultaneously\\n- Performance benchmarking across platforms\\n- Cross-platform consistency verification\\n- User acceptance testing on all platforms\\n- Beta testing program (all platforms)\\n\\n**Post-Release**:\\n- Crash monitoring (Sentry) for all platforms\\n- Performance monitoring across platforms\\n- User feedback collection (platform-specific)\\n- A/B testing (future, all platforms)\\n\\n---\\n\\n## References\\n\\n- [Mobile Technology Stack](../02-mobile/01-technology-stack.md)\\n- [Mobile Architecture](../02-mobile/02-architecture.md)\\n- [Mobile Implementation](../02-mobile/03-implementation.md)\\n- [Browser Optimization Strategy](./02-browser-optimization-strategy.md)\\n- [Marketplace Platform](../../../docs/internal/marketplace-platform.md)\\n- [Undocumented  [... omitted end of long line]"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 12047,
                  "content": "            \"text\": \"- [Marketplace Platform](../../../docs/internal/marketplace-platform.md)\","
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 12051,
                  "content": "            \"text\": \"- [Undocumented Features](../../../docs/internal/undocumented-features.md)\","
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 13746,
                  "content": "        \"contents\": \"- Handle interruptions gracefully\\n- Cache audio files locally\\n- Stream from CDN\\n\\n### Performance\\n- Lazy load screens\\n- Optimize images\\n- Code splitting\\n- Memoization\\n\\n---\\n\\n## Integration Points\\n\\n### Supabase\\n- **Database**: PostgreSQL queries\\n- **Auth**: Supabase Auth v2 with PKCE\\n- **Storage**: Audio file upload/download\\n- **Realtime**: Live updates\\n\\n### External APIs\\n- **ElevenLabs**: Voice cloning, TTS\\n- **OpenAI**: Conversations, script generation\\n- **Stripe**: Payments, subscriptions\\n\\n---\\n\\n## Security\\n\\n- Supabase Auth v2 with PKCE\\n- Secure token storage (Keychain/Keystore)\\n- HTTPS only\\n- RLS policies\\n- GDPR compliant\\n\\n---\\n\\n## Performance Targets\\n\\n- App launch: &amp;lt; 2s\\n- Screen transition: &amp;lt; 300ms\\n- API response: &amp;lt; 500ms\\n- Audio playback start: &amp;lt; 1s\\n- Bundle size: &amp;lt; 50MB\\n\\n---\\n\\n## References\\n\\n- **Full Architecture**: See &amp;#96;../../../docs/internal/05-system-architecture.md&amp;#96;\\n- **Implementation**:  [... omitted end of long line]"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 13932,
                  "content": "            \"text\": \"- **Full Architecture**: See &amp;#96;../../../docs/internal/05-system-architecture.md&amp;#96;\","
                }
              ]
            },

              "file": "./.specstory/history/2026-02-16_07-15Z-documentation-analysis-for-architecture-and-systems.md",

                  "lineNumber": 156,
                  "content": "        \"contents\": \"# Core Product Documentation Reference\\n\\n**Purpose**: Reference guide to main waQup product documentation\\n\\n**Location**: &amp;#96;../../docs/internal/&amp;#96; (main waQup project)\\n\\n---\\n\\n## How to Access\\n\\n**Direct Access**: &amp;#96;../../docs/internal/&amp;#96;  \\n**Use Context7**: Query docs using Context7 (recommended)\\n\\n---\\n\\n## Complete Documentation List\\n\\n### Core Documents (01-07)\\n\\n1. **01-product-constitution.md**\\n   - Core identity, principles, boundaries\\n   - Three content types definition\\n   - Voice-first design principles\\n\\n2. **02-scientific-foundations.md**\\n   - Scientific backing and research\\n   - Neuroplasticity, subconscious mind\\n   - Voice prosody effects\\n\\n3. **03-conversational-system.md**\\n   - Conversation flows\\n   - Content types (affirmations, meditations, rituals)\\n   - State machine\\n\\n4. **04-ai-voice-ethics.md**\\n   - AI voice guidelines\\n   - Ethical boundaries\\n   - Privacy principles\\n\\n5. **05-system-architecture.md**\\n   - C [... omitted end of long line]"

                  "lineNumber": 706,
                  "content": "        \"contents\": \"# Documentation Organization &amp;amp; Hierarchy\\n\\n**Purpose**: Overview of documentation structure, hierarchy, and coherence\\n\\n---\\n\\n## Complete Structure\\n\\n&amp;#96;&amp;#96;&amp;#96;\\ndocs/\\n├── README.md                    # Main documentation overview\\n│\\n├── 01-core/                    # Core product documentation (references)\\n│   └── README.md               # Reference guide to main docs\\n│\\n├── 02-mobile/                  # Mobile-specific documentation ONLY\\n│   ├── README.md               # Mobile docs overview\\n│   ├── 01-technology-stack.md  # Mobile tech stack &amp;amp; decisions\\n│   ├── 02-architecture.md      # Mobile architecture\\n│   └── 03-implementation.md    # Mobile implementation guide\\n│\\n├── 03-platforms/               # Multi-platform strategy &amp;amp; optimization\\n│   ├── README.md               # Platform docs overview\\n│   ├── 01-multi-platform-strategy.md  # Mobile + Web strategy\\n│   └── 02-browser-optimization-strategy.md  # Chrome-first browser stra [... omitted end of long line]"
                },

                  "content": "            \"text\": \"**Content**: Links and references to &amp;#96;../../docs/internal/&amp;#96;  \","
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 915,
                  "content": "        \"contents\": \"- **Loading states** - show loading indicators during async operations\\n- **Empty states** - beautiful empty states for all screens\\n- **Performance optimized** - follow performance targets\\n\\n### 5. Multi-Platform Parallel Development\\n- **Both platforms developed simultaneously** - Mobile and Web in parallel\\n- **Shared codebase** - Business logic in &amp;#96;packages/shared/&amp;#96;\\n- **Platform-specific UI** - UI components in each platform folder\\n- **Test simultaneously** - Test both platforms together\\n- **Consistency** - Ensure UI/UX consistency across platforms\\n- **Web as Desktop** - Web app serves desktop users via browsers (PWA support)\\n\\n### 6. Mobile-First Design (Mobile Platform)\\n- **Optimize for mobile screens** - not desktop\\n- **Touch-friendly** - proper touch targets (44x44pt minimum)\\n- **Background audio** - support background playback\\n- **Offline support** - cache data for offline access\\n- **Native feel** - use native components and patterns\\n\\n [... omitted end of long line]"
                },

                {
                  "lineNumber": 1746,
                  "content": "        \"contents\": \"- **Status**: ✅ Complete (or ⏳ Pending)\\n- **Completed**: YYYY-MM-DD\\n- **Notes**: What was done\\n- **Updated**: YYYY-MM-DD\\n&amp;#96;&amp;#96;&amp;#96;\\n\\n---\\n\\n## File Naming Conventions\\n\\n### Components\\n- **PascalCase**: &amp;#96;Button.tsx&amp;#96;, &amp;#96;AudioPlayer.tsx&amp;#96;\\n- **Screens**: &amp;#96;*Screen.tsx&amp;#96; suffix\\n- **Hooks**: &amp;#96;use*&amp;#96; prefix\\n\\n### Files\\n- **kebab-case**: &amp;#96;audio-service.ts&amp;#96;, &amp;#96;content-api.ts&amp;#96;\\n- **Types**: &amp;#96;*.types.ts&amp;#96; or in &amp;#96;types/&amp;#96; folder\\n- **Numbered docs**: &amp;#96;01-name.md&amp;#96;, &amp;#96;02-name.md&amp;#96; (for ordered docs)\\n\\n### Folders\\n- **kebab-case**: &amp;#96;api-services/&amp;#96;\\n- **Numbered**: &amp;#96;01-core/&amp;#96;, &amp;#96;02-mobile/&amp;#96; (for ordered folders)\\n\\n---\\n\\n## Git Workflow\\n\\n### Commits\\n- **Descriptive messages** - what and why\\n- **Reference steps** - mention step number\\n- **Update changelog** - in same commit\\n\\n### Branches\\n- **main** - production-ready code\\n- **feature/*** - new features\\n- **fix/ [... omitted end of long line]"
                },

                  "lineNumber": 1981,
                  "content": "        \"contents\": \"# waQup Mobile App - Cursor Rules\\n\\n## Project Context\\n\\nThis is the **waQup multi-platform rebuild** - building Mobile (React Native + Expo for Android/iOS) and Web (Next.js for desktop browsers) apps **simultaneously from scratch**. This is the **main development repository** for the new waQup platform.\\n\\n**Location**: &amp;#96;waqup-app/waqup-new/&amp;#96; (this is the active development repo)\\n**Strategy**: **Parallel Development** - Mobile and Web platforms developed simultaneously\\n**Tech Stack**: \\n- **Mobile**: React Native + Expo SDK 54 + TypeScript 5.9.3 (Android + iOS)\\n- **Web**: Next.js 16.1.6 + TypeScript 5.9.3 (Desktop browsers - Chrome-first)\\n- **Shared**: Supabase backend (same as web app)\\n**Goal**: Production-ready apps for iOS, Android, and Web browsers (Chrome-first, PWA support)\\n\\n---\\n\\n## Core Principles\\n\\n### 1. Step-by-Step Verification\\n- **Each step must be independently testable**\\n- **Clear UI checkpoints at each step** - visible progres [... omitted end of long line]"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2101,
                  "content": "            \"text\": \"- **Base all work on existing docs** in &amp;#96;../../docs/&amp;#96; and &amp;#96;docs/&amp;#96;\","
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2109,
                  "content": "            \"text\": \"- **Reference scientific foundations** from &amp;#96;../../docs/internal/02-scientific-foundations.md&amp;#96;\","
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2113,

                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2422,
                  "content": "        \"contents\": \"---\\n\\n## How to Use\\n\\n1. **For Mobile Development**: \\n   - Tech Stack: &amp;#96;02-mobile/01-technology-stack.md&amp;#96;\\n   - Architecture: &amp;#96;02-mobile/02-architecture.md&amp;#96;\\n   - Implementation: &amp;#96;02-mobile/03-implementation.md&amp;#96;\\n\\n2. **For Multi-Platform Strategy**: \\n   - Platform Strategy: &amp;#96;03-platforms/01-multi-platform-strategy.md&amp;#96;\\n   - Browser Optimization: &amp;#96;03-platforms/02-browser-optimization-strategy.md&amp;#96;\\n\\n3. **For Reference Guides**: \\n   - Showcase access: &amp;#96;04-reference/01-showcase-access.md&amp;#96;\\n\\n4. **For Product Context**: See &amp;#96;01-core/README.md&amp;#96; → &amp;#96;../../docs/internal/&amp;#96;\\n\\n---\\n\\n## Roadmap &amp;amp; Planning\\n\\nSee &amp;#96;../rebuild-roadmap/&amp;#96; for:\\n- Complete roadmap\\n- Schema verification\\n- Phase analyses\\n- Changelog tracking\\n\\n---\\n\\n**Last Updated**: 2026-02-07\","
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2485,
                  "content": "            \"text\": \"4. **For Product Context**: See &amp;#96;01-core/README.md&amp;#96; → &amp;#96;../../docs/internal/&amp;#96;\","
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2552,
                  "content": "        \"contents\": \"# waQup Production Rebuild Roadmap\\n\\n**Goal**: Rebuild waQup from scratch as a production-ready mobile app for iOS and Android app stores, with high-quality design, fast performance, and scientific backing.\\n\\n**Approach**: Each step is independently runnable with clear, visible UI differences. We build incrementally, testing at each stage.\\n\\n**Important**: For detailed analysis of each phase with \\\"now/after\\\" comparisons, schema verification, and step-by-step implementation details, see:\\n- [Schema Verification](./02-schema-verification.md) - Complete database schema analysis\\n- [Phase Analyses](../02-phases/) - Detailed analysis for each phase\\n- [Changelog](../03-tracking/01-changelog.md) - **Track step completion and updates**\\n- [Analysis Template](../03-tracking/02-analysis-template.md) - Template for phase analysis\\n- [Step Tracking Template](../03-tracking/03-step-tracking.md) - Template for tracking individual steps\\n- [Technology Stack](../../docs/02-m [... omitted end of long line]"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2601,
                  "content": "            \"text\": \"- [Technology Stack](../../docs/02-mobile/01-technology-stack.md) - Finalized tech stack\","
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2605,
                  "content": "            \"text\": \"- [Architecture](../../docs/02-mobile/02-architecture.md) - Mobile architecture\","
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2609,
                  "content": "            \"text\": \"- [Implementation](../../docs/02-mobile/03-implementation.md) - Implementation guide\","
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2860,
                  "content": "        \"contents\": \"# Platform Documentation\\n\\n**Purpose**: Multi-platform strategy and optimization guides for Mobile and Web platforms\\n\\n---\\n\\n## Structure\\n\\n&amp;#96;&amp;#96;&amp;#96;\\n03-platforms/\\n├── README.md                           # This file\\n├── 01-multi-platform-strategy.md       # Mobile + Web strategy\\n└── 02-browser-optimization-strategy.md # Chrome-first browser strategy\\n&amp;#96;&amp;#96;&amp;#96;\\n\\n---\\n\\n## Quick Navigation\\n\\n### 📱 Multi-Platform Strategy\\n- **[01 Multi-Platform Strategy](./01-multi-platform-strategy.md)** - Strategy for Mobile and Web platforms developed simultaneously\\n\\n### 🌐 Browser Optimization\\n- **[02 Browser Optimization Strategy](./02-browser-optimization-strategy.md)** - Chrome-first browser optimization strategy\\n\\n---\\n\\n## Documentation Hierarchy\\n\\n### Mobile-Specific Docs\\nSee &amp;#96;../02-mobile/&amp;#96; for:\\n- Technology Stack (mobile)\\n- Architecture (mobile)\\n- Implementation (mobile)\\n\\n### Platform Strategy Docs\\nThis folder (&amp;#96;03-platforms/&amp; [... omitted end of long line]"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 3056,
                  "content": "            \"text\": \"4. **For Product Context**: See &amp;#96;../01-core/&amp;#96; → &amp;#96;../../docs/internal/&amp;#96;\","
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 3088,
                  "content": "        \"contents\": \"## Using Context7\\n\\n**Recommended**: Use Context7 to query these docs\\n\\n**Example**:\\n&amp;#96;&amp;#96;&amp;#96;\\nContext7 Query: \\\"What are the three content types in waQup?\\\"\\nReference: ../../docs/internal/01-product-constitution.md\\n&amp;#96;&amp;#96;&amp;#96;\\n\\nSee &amp;#96;../03-reference/01-context7-usage.md&amp;#96; for detailed guide.\\n\\n---\\n\\n**Purpose**: Reference only - main docs stay in &amp;#96;../../docs/internal/&amp;#96;\","
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 3118,
                  "content": "            \"text\": \"Reference: ../../docs/internal/01-product-constitution.md\","
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 3143,
                  "content": "            \"text\": \"**Purpose**: Reference only - main docs stay in &amp;#96;../../docs/internal/&amp;#96;\","
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 3161,
                  "content": "        \"contents\": \"2. **Implement on both platforms** - Mobile and Web simultaneously\\n3. **Test frequently** - after each change on both platforms\\n4. **Update changelog** - mark progress\\n5. **Document decisions** - note why choices were made\\n6. **Keep schemas coherent** - verify at each step\\n7. **Ensure consistency** - UI/UX consistent across platforms\\n\\n### After Completing a Step\\n\\n1. **Verify UI checkpoint** - see visible progress on both platforms\\n2. **Test functionality** - ensure it works on Mobile and Web\\n3. **Verify consistency** - UI/UX consistent across platforms\\n4. **Update changelog** - mark complete with date in &amp;#96;rebuild-roadmap/03-tracking/01-changelog.md&amp;#96;\\n5. **Update docs** - if needed\\n6. **Commit changes** - with descriptive message\\n\\n### When Re-Running a Step\\n\\n1. **Check changelog** - see what was done before in &amp;#96;rebuild-roadmap/03-tracking/01-changelog.md&amp;#96;\\n2. **Update changelog** - add new entry with date\\n3. **Note changes** - what  [... omitted end of long line]"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 3312,
                  "content": "            \"text\": \"**Reference**: Use Context7 to query &amp;#96;../../docs/internal/01-product-constitution.md&amp;#96;\","
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 3919,
                  "content": "        \"contents\": \"# Phase 0: Research &amp;amp; Planning - Detailed Analysis\\n\\n## Overview\\n**Goal**: Validate technology choices, gather best practices, and establish scientific foundations for the mobile app rebuild\\n**Status**: ✅ Complete → Ready for Phase 1\\n**Dependencies**: None (starting point)\\n\\n## Changelog\\n\\n### 2026-02-07 - Initial Analysis Created\\n- **Status**: 📝 Analysis Complete\\n- **Notes**: Research phase completed, technology stack finalized, documentation created\\n- **Next**: Begin Phase 1 (Project Foundation)\\n\\n---\\n\\n## Current State Analysis (NOW)\\n\\n### Current Implementation\\n**Location**: Documentation and research phase (no code yet)\\n\\n**What Exists**:\\n- ✅ Technology stack research completed\\n- ✅ Scientific foundations documented\\n- ✅ App store requirements reviewed\\n- ✅ Architecture decisions made\\n- ✅ Implementation patterns researched\\n\\n**Current Documentation**:\\n- &amp;#96;docs/02-mobile/01-technology-stack.md&amp;#96; - Finalized tech stack\\n- &amp;#96;docs/02 [... omitted end of long line]"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 4047,
                  "content": "            \"text\": \"- &amp;#96;../../docs/internal/&amp;#96; - Complete product documentation\","
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 5084,
                  "content": "        \"contents\": \"- Handle interruptions gracefully\\n- Cache audio files locally\\n- Stream from CDN\\n\\n### Performance\\n- Lazy load screens\\n- Optimize images\\n- Code splitting\\n- Memoization\\n\\n---\\n\\n## Integration Points\\n\\n### Supabase\\n- **Database**: PostgreSQL queries\\n- **Auth**: Supabase Auth v2 with PKCE\\n- **Storage**: Audio file upload/download\\n- **Realtime**: Live updates\\n\\n### External APIs\\n- **ElevenLabs**: Voice cloning, TTS\\n- **OpenAI**: Conversations, script generation\\n- **Stripe**: Payments, subscriptions\\n\\n---\\n\\n## Security\\n\\n- Supabase Auth v2 with PKCE\\n- Secure token storage (Keychain/Keystore)\\n- HTTPS only\\n- RLS policies\\n- GDPR compliant\\n\\n---\\n\\n## Performance Targets\\n\\n- App launch: &amp;lt; 2s\\n- Screen transition: &amp;lt; 300ms\\n- API response: &amp;lt; 500ms\\n- Audio playback start: &amp;lt; 1s\\n- Bundle size: &amp;lt; 50MB\\n\\n---\\n\\n## References\\n\\n- **Full Architecture**: See &amp;#96;../../../docs/internal/05-system-architecture.md&amp;#96;\\n- **Implementation**:  [... omitted end of long line]"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 5270,
                  "content": "            \"text\": \"- **Full Architecture**: See &amp;#96;../../../docs/internal/05-system-architecture.md&amp;#96;\","
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 5296,
                  "content": "        \"contents\": \"- **When verifying**: Use Context7 to check requirements\\n- **When documenting**: Use Context7 to reference existing patterns\\n\\n### Documentation Access Strategy\\n\\n1. **Primary**: Use Context7 to query docs (fastest, most accurate)\\n2. **Secondary**: Read files directly if Context7 unavailable\\n3. **Reference**: Use &amp;#96;../../docs/internal/&amp;#96; for full context\\n4. **Mobile**: Use &amp;#96;docs/02-mobile/&amp;#96; for mobile-specific information\\n\\n### When Creating New Docs\\n\\n- **Use Context7 first** - query existing docs for patterns\\n- **Reference existing docs** - adapt from &amp;#96;../../docs/&amp;#96;\\n- **Follow numbering** - use numbered format (01-, 02-, etc.)\\n- **Keep structure consistent** - follow existing patterns\\n- **Update changelog** - document what was created\\n- **Link from README** - add to appropriate README\\n\\n---\\n\\n## Technology Stack (Finalized)\\n\\n### Core\\n- **Framework**: React Native + Expo SDK 54 (Mobile: Android + iOS)\\n- **Language**: TypeScr [... omitted end of long line]"
                },

We build incrementally, testing at each stage.\\n\\n**Important**: For detailed analysis of each phase with \\\"now/after\\\" comparisons, schema verification, and step-by-step implementation details, see:\\n- [Schema Verification](./02-schema-verification.md) - Complete database schema analysis\\n- [Phase Analyses](../02-phases/) - Detailed analysis for each phase\\n- [Changelog](../03-tracking/01-changelog.md) - **Track step completion and updates**\\n- [Analysis Template](../03-tracking/02-analysis-template.md) - Template for phase analysis\\n- [Step Tracking Template](../03-tracking/03-step-tracking.md) - Template for tracking individual steps\\n- [Technology Stack](../../docs/02-m [... omitted end of long line]"

                  "content": "        \"contents\": \"# waQup Mobile App - Cursor Rules\\n\\n## Project Context\\n\\nThis is the **waQup multi-platform rebuild** - building Mobile (React Native + Expo for Android/iOS) and Web (Next.js for desktop browsers) apps **simultaneously from scratch**. This is the **main development repository** for the new waQup platform.\\n\\n**Location**: &amp;#96;waqup-app/waqup-new/&amp;#96; (this is the active development repo)\\n**Strategy**: **Parallel Development** - Mobile and Web platforms developed simultaneously\\n**Tech Stack**: \\n- **Mobile**: React Native + Expo SDK 54 + TypeScript 5.9.3 (Android + iOS)\\n- **Web**: Next.js 16.1.6 + TypeScript 5.9.3 (Desktop browsers - Chrome-first)\\n- **Shared**: Supabase backend (same as web app)\\n**Goal**: Production-ready apps for iOS, Android, and Web browsers (Chrome-first, PWA support)\\n\\n---\\n\\n## Core Principles\\n\\n### 1.                   "lineNumber": 22135,
                  "content": "  \"plan\": \"# Documentation Full Coherence Update\\n\\n## 1. Pipeline docs (one MD per content type)\\n\\nCreate three pipeline spec files in &amp;#96;docs/01-core/&amp;#96;, grounded in the scientific foundations you provided:\\n\\n### 1.1 &amp;#96;docs/01-core/02-pipeline-affirmations.md&amp;#96;\\n\\n**Purpose**: Exact steps for affirmation creation. Scientific basis: cognitive re-patterning, repetition, positive language, believability, emotion, **own voice** (Research principle 13).\\n\\n**Steps** (conversational, chat-like, no static forms):\\n\\n| Step | Purpose | Inputs | Outputs | LLM/TTS? |\\n|------|---------|--------|---------|----------|\\n| 1. Intent | User articulates what they want to change/strengthen | Conversation | intent (string, structured) | LLM clarifies |\\n| 2. Script | Generate affirmations: positive, present-tense, believable, gradual | intent | script (text) | LLM (GPT-4) |\\n| 3. Voice | Choose: user record own voice OR ElevenLabs TTS | script, choice | audio_url | Recording or ElevenLabs [... omitted end of long line]"
                },

                }

                  "lineNumber": 36467,
                  "content": "        \"contents\": \"---\\n\\n## How to Use\\n\\n1. **For Mobile Development**: \\n   - Tech Stack: &amp;#96;02-mobile/01-technology-stack.md&amp;#96;\\n   - Architecture: &amp;#96;02-mobile/02-architecture.md&amp;#96;\\n   - Implementation: &amp;#96;02-mobile/03-implementation.md&amp;#96;\\n\\n2. **For Multi-Platform Strategy**: \\n   - Platform Strategy: &amp;#96;03-platforms/01-multi-platform-strategy.md&amp;#96;\\n   - Browser Optimization: &amp;#96;03-platforms/02-browser-optimization-strategy.md&amp;#96;\\n\\n3. **For Reference Guides**: \\n   - Showcase access: &amp;#96;04-reference/01-showcase-access.md&amp;#96;\\n\\n4. **For Product Context**: See &amp;#96;01-core/README.md&amp;#96; → &amp;#96;../../docs/internal/&amp;#96;\\n\\n---\\n\\n## Roadmap &amp;amp; Planning\\n\\nSee &amp;#96;../rebuild-roadmap/&amp;#96; for:\\n- Complete roadmap\\n- Schema verification\\n- Phase analyses\\n- Changelog tracking\\n\\n---\\n\\n**Last Updated**: 2026-02-07\","
