                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 3760,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"The internal docs are in ../../docs/internal/ - that path would be outside this repo. Let me search this repo for any copies or references to flows, voice interaction, and list all routes from the roadmap vs what we have in the app.\""
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 3764,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"                  \\\"content\\\": \\\"- [Audio Generation](../../../docs/internal/audio-generation.md)\\\"\""
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 3768,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"I don't have direct access to Context7 or to ../../docs/internal/ (that's in the parent waQup project). The user said \\\"use context77\\\" - I'll assume they want me to use the docs that are referenced from this repo. The 01-core/README points to ../../docs/internal/ for flows.md, voice-interaction-design.md, marketplace-platform.md, 03-conversational-system.md. Those aren't in this repo. So I'll work from:\""
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 3772,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"                  \\\"content\\\": \\\"- [Conversational System](../../../docs/internal/03-conversational-system.md)\\\"\""
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 3776,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"I don't have a local copy of ../../docs/internal/ in this repo - it's the parent project. So I can't \\\"use Context7\\\" to query those directly from this workspace. I've used what's in this repo: rebuild-roadmap, docs (01-core README points to internal), and .cursorrules.\""
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 3780,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"- **Intended pages** – Lists what the roadmap and main-product docs (e.g. &amp;#96;flows.md&amp;#96;, &amp;#96;03-conversational-system.md&amp;#96;, &amp;#96;voice-interaction-design.md&amp;#96;, &amp;#96;marketplace-platform.md&amp;#96;) say should exist. Those live under &amp;#96;../../docs/internal/&amp;#96;; the doc says to use **Context7** to query them and summarizes the result.\""
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 3784,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"The **main product docs** (flows, conversational system, voice interaction, marketplace) are in the **parent project** at &amp;#96;../../docs/internal/&amp;#96;. This repo’s &amp;#96;docs/01-core/README.md&amp;#96; points to them and says to use **Context7** to query. I couldn’t run Context7 from here; the comparison doc is written so that when you (or someone) runs Context7 against &amp;#96;docs/internal/&amp;#96;, the structure and intent match. If something in &amp;#96;docs/internal/&amp;#96; contradicts the comparison, that doc is the place to update after you run Context7.\""
                },

                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"                  \\\"content\\\": \\\"  - For each: status (exists / to create), key columns, and reference to &amp;amp;#96;../../docs/internal/database.md&amp;amp;#96;.\\\",\""

                {
                  "lineNumber": 4534,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"        \\\"contents\\\": \\\"# Core Product Documentation Reference\\\\n\\\\n**Purpose**: Reference guide to main waQup product documentation and in-repo pipeline/summary docs\\\\n\\\\n**Location**: &amp;amp;#96;../../docs/internal/&amp;amp;#96; (main waQup project) — full detail in external docs\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## In-Repo Pipeline &amp;amp;amp; Summary Docs (this folder)\\\\n\\\\n| Doc | Purpose |\\\\n|-----|---------|\\\\n| [02-pipeline-affirmations.md](./02-pipeline-affirmations.md) | Affirmation creation steps (Intent → Script → Voice → Audio → Review) |\\\\n| [03-pipeline-meditations.md](./03-pipeline-meditations.md) | Meditation creation steps (+ Context) |\\\\n| [04-pipeline-rituals.md](./04-pipeline-rituals.md) | Ritual creation steps (+ Context, Personalization) |\\\\n| [05-pipelines-overview.md](./05-pipelines-overview.md) | Overview, shared Audio page, route map |\\\\n| [06-audio-generation-summary.md](./06-audio-generation-summary.md) | TTS (ElevenLabs), recording, Audio page spec |\\\\n| [... omitted end of long line]"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 4538,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"            \\\"text\\\": \\\"**Location**: &amp;amp;#96;../../docs/internal/&amp;amp;#96; (main waQup project) — full detail in external docs\\\",\""
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 4542,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"            \\\"text\\\": \\\"**Direct Access**: &amp;amp;#96;../../docs/internal/&amp;amp;#96; (main waQup project)  \\\",\""
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 4546,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"            \\\"text\\\": \\\"## External Documentation List (full detail in &amp;amp;#96;../../docs/internal/&amp;amp;#96;)\\\",\""
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 4550,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"        \\\"contents\\\": \\\"**Content**: Links to &amp;amp;#96;../../docs/internal/&amp;amp;#96;; pipeline specs (02–04), overview (05), audio (06), marketplace (07), LLM (08)  \\\\n**Scope**: Product constitution, scientific foundations, pipelines, audio, marketplace, conversation\\\\n\\\\n### 02-mobile/ - Mobile-Specific Docs\\\\n**Purpose**: Mobile app development documentation  \\\\n**Content**: Mobile-specific tech stack, architecture, implementation  \\\\n**Scope**: React Native, Expo, mobile patterns, mobile optimizations  \\\\n**Coherence**: ✅ Contains ONLY mobile-specific content\\\\n\\\\n### 03-platforms/ - Multi-Platform Strategy\\\\n**Purpose**: Cross-platform development strategies  \\\\n**Content**: Multi-platform strategy, browser optimization  \\\\n**Scope**: Mobile + Web, parallel development, browser strategies  \\\\n**Coherence**: ✅ Separated from mobile-specific docs\\\\n\\\\n### 04-reference/ - Reference Guides\\\\n**Purpose**: Reference documentation (SSOT)  \\\\n**Content**: Sho [... omitted end of long line]"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 4554,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"            \\\"text\\\": \\\"**Content**: Links to &amp;amp;#96;../../docs/internal/&amp;amp;#96;; pipeline specs (02–04), overview (05), audio (06), marketplace (07), LLM (08)  \\\",\""
                },

                  "lineNumber": 4562,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"            \\\"text\\\": \\\"**Content**: Links to &amp;amp;#96;../../docs/internal/&amp;amp;#96;; pipeline specs (02–04), overview (05), audio (06), marketplace (07), LLM (08)  \\\",\""

                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"            \\\"text\\\": \\\"- **Full Details**: See &amp;amp;#96;../../../docs/internal/05-system-architecture.md&amp;amp;#96;\\\",\""

                {
                  "lineNumber": 4574,

                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 4582,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"            \\\"text\\\": \\\"4. **For Product Context**: See &amp;amp;#96;../01-core/&amp;amp;#96; → &amp;amp;#96;../../docs/internal/&amp;amp;#96;\\\",\""
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 4586,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"        \\\"contents\\\": \\\"3. Implement same feature on Platform C (Web)\\\\n4. Test all three platforms simultaneously\\\\n5. Fix inconsistencies\\\\n6. Verify quality standards met on all platforms\\\\n\\\\n**Before Release**:\\\\n- Manual QA on all platforms simultaneously\\\\n- Performance benchmarking across platforms\\\\n- Cross-platform consistency verification\\\\n- User acceptance testing on all platforms\\\\n- Beta testing program (all platforms)\\\\n\\\\n**Post-Release**:\\\\n- Crash monitoring (Sentry) for all platforms\\\\n- Performance monitoring across platforms\\\\n- User feedback collection (platform-specific)\\\\n- A/B testing (future, all platforms)\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## References\\\\n\\\\n- [Mobile Technology Stack](../02-mobile/01-technology-stack.md)\\\\n- [Mobile Architecture](../02-mobile/02-architecture.md)\\\\n- [Mobile Implementation](../02-mobile/03-implementation.md)\\\\n- [Browser Optimization Strategy](./02-browser-optimization-strategy.md)\\\\n- [Marketplace Platform](../../ [... omitted end of long line]"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 4590,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"            \\\"text\\\": \\\"- [Marketplace Platform](../../../docs/internal/marketplace-platform.md)\\\",\""
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 4594,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"            \\\"text\\\": \\\"- [Undocumented Features](../../../docs/internal/undocumented-features.md)\\\",\""
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 4598,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"        \\\"contents\\\": \\\"- Handle interruptions gracefully\\\\n- Cache audio files locally\\\\n- Stream from CDN\\\\n\\\\n### Performance\\\\n- Lazy load screens\\\\n- Optimize images\\\\n- Code splitting\\\\n- Memoization\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## Integration Points\\\\n\\\\n### Supabase\\\\n- **Database**: PostgreSQL queries\\\\n- **Auth**: Supabase Auth v2 with PKCE\\\\n- **Storage**: Audio file upload/download\\\\n- **Realtime**: Live updates\\\\n\\\\n### External APIs\\\\n- **ElevenLabs**: Voice cloning, TTS\\\\n- **OpenAI**: Conversations, script generation\\\\n- **Stripe**: Payments, subscriptions\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## Security\\\\n\\\\n- Supabase Auth v2 with PKCE\\\\n- Secure token storage (Keychain/Keystore)\\\\n- HTTPS only\\\\n- RLS policies\\\\n- GDPR compliant\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## Performance Targets\\\\n\\\\n- App launch: &amp;amp;lt; 2s\\\\n- Screen transition: &amp;amp;lt; 300ms\\\\n- API response: &amp;amp;lt; 500ms\\\\n- Audio playback start: &amp;amp;lt; 1s\\\\n- Bundle size: &amp;amp;lt; 50MB\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## References\\\\n\\\\n- **Full  [... omitted end of long line]"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 4602,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"            \\\"text\\\": \\\"- **Full Architecture**: See &amp;amp;#96;../../../docs/internal/05-system-architecture.md&amp;amp;#96;\\\",\""
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 4611,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"I need to search through the docs (both in this project and the referenced ../../docs/internal/) to understand what exists and identify any gaps. Let me start by exploring the documentation structure and then dive into each area.\""
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 4615,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"1. List and read the internal docs (../../docs/internal/)\""
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 4619,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"I need to check if there's an ../../docs/internal/ folder - the cursorrules reference docs in the main waQup project.                 },

                  "lineNumber": 4623,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"        \\\"contents\\\": \\\"# Core Product Documentation Reference\\\\n\\\\n**Purpose**: Reference guide to main waQup product documentation\\\\n\\\\n**Location**: &amp;amp;#96;../../docs/internal/&amp;amp;#96; (main waQup project)\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## How to Access\\\\n\\\\n**Direct Access**: &amp;amp;#96;../../docs/internal/&amp;amp;#96;  \\\\n**Use Context7**: Query docs using Context7 (recommended)\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## Complete Documentation List\\\\n\\\\n### Core Documents (01-07)\\\\n\\\\n1. **01-product-constitution.md**\\\\n   - Core identity, principles, boundaries\\\\n   - Three content types definition\\\\n   - Voice-first design principles\\\\n\\\\n2. **02-scientific-foundations.md**\\\\n   - Scientific backing and research\\\\n   - Neuroplasticity, subconscious mind\\\\n   - Voice prosody effects\\\\n\\\\n3. **03-conversational-system.md**\\\\n   - Conversation flows\\\\n   - Content types (affirmations, meditations, rituals)\\\\n   - State machine\\\\n\\\\n4. **04-ai-voice-ethics.md**\\\\n   - AI voice guidelines\\\\n   - Et [... omitted end of long line]"

                {

                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"            \\\"text\\\": \\\"9. **Product Constitution**: &amp;amp;#96;../../docs/internal/01-product-constitution.md&amp;amp;#96; - Core principles\\\",\""
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 4731,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"            \\\"text\\\": \\\"10. **Scientific Foundations**: &amp;amp;#96;../../docs/internal/02-scientific-foundations.md&amp;amp;#96; - Research backing\\\",\""
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 4735,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"            \\\"text\\\": \\\"11. **System Architecture**: &amp;amp;#96;../../docs/internal/05-system-architecture.md&amp;amp;#96; - Full architecture\\\",\""
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 4743,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"            \\\"text\\\": \\\"- **Reference scientific foundations** from &amp;amp;#96;../../docs/internal/02-scientific-foundations.md&amp;amp;#96;\\\",\""
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 4747,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"            \\\"text\\\": \\\"- **Follow product constitution** from &amp;amp;#96;../../docs/internal/01-product-constitution.md&amp;amp;#96;\\\",\""
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 4751,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"        \\\"contents\\\": \\\"---\\\\n\\\\n## How to Use\\\\n\\\\n1. **For Mobile Development**: \\\\n   - Tech Stack: &amp;amp;#96;02-mobile/01-technology-stack.md&amp;amp;#96;\\\\n   - Architecture: &amp;amp;#96;02-mobile/02-architecture.md&amp;amp;#96;\\\\n   - Implementation: &amp;amp;#96;02-mobile/03-implementation.md&amp;amp;#96;\\\\n\\\\n2. **For Multi-Platform Strategy**: \\\\n   - Platform Strategy: &amp;amp;#96;03-platforms/01-multi-platform-strategy.md&amp;amp;#96;\\\\n   - Browser Optimization: &amp;amp;#96;03-platforms/02-browser-optimization-strategy.md&amp;amp;#96;\\\\n\\\\n3. **For Reference Guides**: \\\\n   - Showcase access: &amp;amp;#96;04-reference/01-showcase-access.md&amp;amp;#96;\\\\n\\\\n4. **For Product Context**: See &amp;amp;#96;01-core/README.md&amp;amp;#96; → &amp;amp;#96;../../docs/internal/&amp;amp;#96;\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## Roadmap &amp;amp;amp; Planning\\\\n\\\\nSee &amp;amp;#96;../rebuild-roadmap/&amp;amp;#96; for:\\\\n- Complete roadmap\\\\n- Schema verification\\\\n- Phase analyses\\\\n- Changelog tracking\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n**Last Updated**: 2026-02-07 [... omitted end of long line]"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 4755,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"            \\\"text\\\": \\\"4. **For Product Context**: See &amp;amp;#96;01-core/README.md&amp;amp;#96; → &amp;amp;#96;../../docs/internal/&amp;amp;#96;\\\",\""
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 4763,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"            \\\"text\\\": \\\"4. **For Product Context**: See &amp;amp;#96;../01-core/&amp;amp;#96; → &amp;amp;#96;../../docs/internal/&amp;amp;#96;\\\",\""
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 4767,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"        \\\"contents\\\": \\\"## Using Context7\\\\n\\\\n**Recommended**: Use Context7 to query these docs\\\\n\\\\n**Example**:\\\\n&amp;amp;#96;&amp;amp;#96;&amp;amp;#96;\\\\nContext7 Query: \\\\\\\"What are the three content types in waQup?\\\\\\\"\\\\nReference: ../../docs/internal/01-product-constitution.md\\\\n&amp;amp;#96;&amp;amp;#96;&amp;amp;#96;\\\\n\\\\nSee &amp;amp;#96;../03-reference/01-context7-usage.md&amp;amp;#96; for detailed guide.\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n**Purpose**: Reference only - main docs stay in &amp;amp;#96;../../docs/internal/&amp;amp;#96;\\\",\""
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 4771,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"            \\\"text\\\": \\\"Reference: ../../docs/internal/01-product-constitution.md\\\",\""
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 4775,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"            \\\"text\\\": \\\"**Purpose**: Reference only - main docs stay in &amp;amp;#96;../../docs/internal/&amp;amp;#96;\\\",\""
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 4783,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"            \\\"text\\\": \\\"**Reference**: Use Context7 to query &amp;amp;#96;../../docs/internal/01-product-constitution.md&amp;amp;#96;\\\",\""
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 4791,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"            \\\"text\\\": \\\"- &amp;amp;#96;../../docs/internal/&amp;amp;#96; - Complete product documentation\\\",\""
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 4795,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"        \\\"contents\\\": \\\"- Handle interruptions gracefully\\\\n- Cache audio files locally\\\\n- Stream from CDN\\\\n\\\\n### Performance\\\\n- Lazy load screens\\\\n- Optimize images\\\\n- Code splitting\\\\n- Memoization\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## Integration Points\\\\n\\\\n### Supabase\\\\n- **Database**: PostgreSQL queries\\\\n- **Auth**: Supabase Auth v2 with PKCE\\\\n- **Storage**: Audio file upload/download\\\\n- **Realtime**: Live updates\\\\n\\\\n### External APIs\\\\n- **ElevenLabs**: Voice cloning, TTS\\\\n- **OpenAI**: Conversations, script generation\\\\n- **Stripe**: Payments, subscriptions\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## Security\\\\n\\\\n- Supabase Auth v2 with PKCE\\\\n- Secure token storage (Keychain/Keystore)\\\\n- HTTPS only\\\\n- RLS policies\\\\n- GDPR compliant\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## Performance Targets\\\\n\\\\n- App launch: &amp;amp;lt; 2s\\\\n- Screen transition: &amp;amp;lt; 300ms\\\\n- API response: &amp;amp;lt; 500ms\\\\n- Audio playback start: &amp;amp;lt; 1s\\\\n- Bundle size: &amp;amp;lt; 50MB\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## References\\\\n\\\\n- **Full  [... omitted end of long line]"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 4799,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"            \\\"text\\\": \\\"- **Full Architecture**: See &amp;amp;#96;../../../docs/internal/05-system-architecture.md&amp;amp;#96;\\\",\""
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 4803,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"        \\\"contents\\\": \\\"- **When verifying**: Use Context7 to check requirements\\\\n- **When documenting**: Use Context7 to reference existing patterns\\\\n\\\\n### Documentation Access Strategy\\\\n\\\\n1. **Primary**: Use Context7 to query docs (fastest, most accurate)\\\\n2. **Secondary**: Read files directly if Context7 unavailable\\\\n3. **Reference**: Use &amp;amp;#96;../../docs/internal/&amp;amp;#96; for full context\\\\n4. **Mobile**: Use &amp;amp;#96;docs/02-mobile/&amp;amp;#96; for mobile-specific information\\\\n\\\\n### When Creating New Docs\\\\n\\\\n- **Use Context7 first** - query existing docs for patterns\\\\n- **Reference existing docs** - adapt from &amp;amp;#96;../../docs/&amp;amp;#96;\\\\n- **Follow numbering** - use numbered format (01-, 02-, etc.)\\\\n- **Keep structure consistent** - follow existing patterns\\\\n- **Update changelog** - document what was created\\\\n- **Link from README** - add to appropriate README\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## Technology Stack (Finalized)\\\\n\\\\n### Core\\\\n- **Framewo [... omitted end of long line]"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 4807,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"            \\\"text\\\": \\\"3. **Reference**: Use &amp;amp;#96;../../docs/internal/&amp;amp;#96; for full context\\\",\""
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 4811,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"The internal docs are referenced as &amp;#96;../../docs/internal/&amp;#96; - that's outside this repo (main waQup project). This repo (waqup-new) doesn't contain those files. I need to:\""
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 4815,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"                  \\\"content\\\": \\\"**References**: Roadmap &amp;amp;#96;rebuild-roadmap/01-planning/01-roadmap.md&amp;amp;#96;, phases &amp;amp;#96;rebuild-roadmap/02-phases/*&amp;amp;#96;; main product docs &amp;amp;#96;../../docs/internal/&amp;amp;#96; (flows, conversational-system, voice-interaction-design, marketplace-platform); current app &amp;amp;#96;packages/web/app/&amp;amp;#96; and &amp;amp;#96;/pages&amp;amp;#96;.\\\"\""
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 4819,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"                  \\\"content\\\": \\\"- [Conversational System](../../../docs/internal/03-conversational-system.md)\\\"\""
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 4823,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"1. Summarizes what docs exist in-repo vs what's only referenced (external ../../docs/internal/)\""
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 4831,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"            \\\"text\\\": \\\"**Reference**: Use Context7 to query &amp;amp;#96;../../docs/internal/01-product-constitution.md&amp;amp;#96;\\\",\""
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 4835,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"        \\\"contents\\\": \\\"# Core Product Documentation Reference\\\\n\\\\n**Purpose**: Reference guide to main waQup product documentation\\\\n\\\\n**Location**: &amp;amp;#96;../../docs/internal/&amp;amp;#96; (main waQup project)\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## How to Access\\\\n\\\\n**Direct Access**: &amp;amp;#96;../../docs/internal/&amp;amp;#96;  \\\\n**Use Context7**: Query docs using Context7 (recommended)\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## Complete Documentation List\\\\n\\\\n### Core Documents (01-07)\\\\n\\\\n1. **01-product-constitution.md**\\\\n   - Core identity, principles, boundaries\\\\n   - Three content types definition\\\\n   - Voice-first design principles\\\\n\\\\n2. **02-scientific-foundations.md**\\\\n   - Scientific backing and research\\\\n   - Neuroplasticity, subconscious mind\\\\n   - Voice prosody effects\\\\n\\\\n3. **03-conversational-system.md**\\\\n   - Conversation flows\\\\n   - Content types (affirmations, meditations, rituals)\\\\n   - State machine\\\\n\\\\n4. **04-ai-voice-ethics.md**\\\\n   - AI voice guidelines\\\\n   - Et [... omitted end of long line]"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 4839,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"            \\\"text\\\": \\\"**Location**: &amp;amp;#96;../../docs/internal/&amp;amp;#96; (main waQup project)\\\",\""
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 4843,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"            \\\"text\\\": \\\"**Direct Access**: &amp;amp;#96;../../docs/internal/&amp;amp;#96;  \\\",\""
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 4851,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"            \\\"text\\\": \\\"- **Reference scientific foundations** from &amp;amp;#96;../../docs/internal/02-scientific-foundations.md&amp;amp;#96;\\\",\""
                },

                  "lineNumber": 4855,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"            \\\"text\\\": \\\"- **Follow product constitution** from &amp;amp;#96;../../docs/internal/01-product-constitution.md&amp;amp;#96;\\\",\""
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 4859,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"        \\\"contents\\\": \\\"**Tracking** (&amp;amp;#96;03-tracking/&amp;amp;#96;):\\\\n- &amp;amp;#96;01-changelog.md&amp;amp;#96; - Step completion tracking, updates, status\\\\n- &amp;amp;#96;02-analysis-template.md&amp;amp;#96; - Template for creating phase analysis documents\\\\n- &amp;amp;#96;03-step-tracking.md&amp;amp;#96; - Template for tracking individual steps\\\\n\\\\n### Using Context7 for Documentation\\\\n\\\\n**ALWAYS use Context7 when you need documentation information:**\\\\n\\\\n1. **For Product Understanding**:\\\\n   &amp;amp;#96;&amp;amp;#96;&amp;amp;#96;\\\\n   Use Context7 to query: \\\\\\\"What are the three content types in waQup and how do they differ?\\\\\\\"\\\\n   Reference: ../../docs/internal/01-product-constitution.md\\\\n   &amp;amp;#96;&amp;amp;#96;&amp;amp;#96;\\\\n\\\\n2. **For Scientific Backing**:\\\\n   &amp;amp;#96;&amp;amp;#96;&amp;amp;#96;\\\\n   Use Context7 to query: \\\\\\\"What is the scientific foundation for voice-first design?\\\\\\\"\\\\n   Reference: ../../docs/internal/02-scientific-foundations.md\\\\n   &amp;amp;#96;&amp;amp;#96;&amp;amp;# [... omitted end of long line]"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 4863,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"            \\\"text\\\": \\\"   Reference: ../../docs/internal/01-product-constitution.md\\\",\""

                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 4875,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"            \\\"text\\\": \\\"   Reference: ../../docs/internal/database.md\\\",\""
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 4879,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"            \\\"text\\\": \\\"   Reference: ../../docs/internal/audio-generation.md\\\",\""
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 4887,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"            \\\"text\\\": \\\"- ✅ Scientific references document (&amp;amp;#96;docs/01-core/README.md&amp;amp;#96; → &amp;amp;#96;../../docs/internal/02-scientific-foundations.md&amp;amp;#96;)\\\",\""
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 4891,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"1. **Architecture**: In-repo we have docs/02-mobile/02-architecture.md (mobile layers, data flow, integration points). Full system architecture is referenced as ../../docs/internal/05-system-architecture.md (external).\""
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 4895,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"- **External**: Full system (APIs, infra) is in &amp;#96;../../docs/internal/05-system-architecture.md&amp;#96;. There is no in-repo doc for the **web app** (Next.js layout, API routes).\""
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 4899,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"- **Gap**: No in-repo spec for the **state machine** (states/transitions), **message/API contract**, or **prompt strategy**. That lives in &amp;#96;../../docs/internal/03-conversational-system.md&amp;#96;.\""
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 4903,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"- **Gap**: No in-repo summary of discovery/creator/verification/viral/revenue; that’s in &amp;#96;../../docs/internal/marketplace-platform.md&amp;#96;.\""
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 4907,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"   - Pointer to &amp;#96;../../docs/internal/database.md&amp;#96;.\""
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 4911,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"- **Product Docs**: &amp;amp;#96;../../docs/internal/&amp;amp;#96; (main project)\""
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 4915,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"                  \\\"content\\\": \\\"**Location**: &amp;amp;#96;../../docs/internal/&amp;amp;#96; (main waQup project - use Context7 to query)\\\"\""
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 4919,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"                  \\\"content\\\": \\\"**Reference**: Use Context7 to query &amp;amp;#96;../../docs/internal/01-product-constitution.md&amp;amp;#96;\\\"\""
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 4923,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"                  \\\"content\\\": \\\"6. **Use Context7 for main docs** - &amp;amp;#96;../../docs/internal/&amp;amp;#96;\\\"\""
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 4931,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"            \\\"text\\\": \\\"**Reference**: Use Context7 to query &amp;amp;#96;../../docs/internal/01-product-constitution.md&amp;amp;#96;\\\",\""
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 4935,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"        \\\"contents\\\": \\\"# Core Product Documentation Reference\\\\n\\\\n**Purpose**: Reference guide to main waQup product documentation\\\\n\\\\n**Location**: &amp;amp;#96;../../docs/internal/&amp;amp;#96; (main waQup project)\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## How to Access\\\\n\\\\n**Direct Access**: &amp;amp;#96;../../docs/internal/&amp;amp;#96;  \\\\n**Use Context7**: Query docs using Context7 (recommended)\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## Complete Documentation List\\\\n\\\\n### Core Documents (01-07)\\\\n\\\\n1. **01-product-constitution.md**\\\\n   - Core identity, principles, boundaries\\\\n   - Three content types definition\\\\n   - Voice-first design principles\\\\n\\\\n2. **02-scientific-foundations.md**\\\\n   - Scientific backing and research\\\\n   - Neuroplasticity, subconscious mind\\\\n   - Voice prosody effects\\\\n\\\\n3. **03-conversational-system.md**\\\\n   - Conversation flows\\\\n   - Content types (affirmations, meditations, rituals)\\\\n   - State machine\\\\n\\\\n4. **04-ai-voice-ethics.md**\\\\n   - AI voice guidelines\\\\n   - Et [... omitted end of long line]"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 4939,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"            \\\"text\\\": \\\"**Location**: &amp;amp;#96;../../docs/internal/&amp;amp;#96; (main waQup project)\\\",\""
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 4943,

                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 4951,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"            \\\"text\\\": \\\"- **Reference scientific foundations** from &amp;amp;#96;../../docs/internal/02-scientific-foundations.md&amp;amp;#96;\\\",\""

                {
                  "lineNumber": 4955,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"            \\\"text\\\": \\\"- **Follow product constitution** from &amp;amp;#96;../../docs/internal/01-product-constitution.md&amp;amp;#96;\\\",\""
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 4959,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"      \\\"prompt\\\": \\\"The GitHub URL you gave (IndiasFernandes/waqup) returned 404. The docs in waqup-new reference &amp;amp;#96;../../docs/internal/&amp;amp;#96; for flows.md, audio-generation.md, marketplace-platform.md, etc. How can we access these main product docs to sync/update waqup-new?\\\",\""
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 4963,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"          \\\"label\\\": \\\"The main waqup project is a sibling folder (e.g. waqup-app/docs/internal/) — I can provide the path\\\"\""
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 4967,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"I'm clarifying the correct relative paths for docs/internal based on project structure. &amp;lt;/details&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/think&amp;gt;\""
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 4971,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"I'm checking the docs/internal directory structure to confirm if it's actually inside the main waqup project or a separate internal docs area. &amp;lt;/details&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/think&amp;gt;\""
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 4979,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"                  \\\"content\\\": \\\"All of that is expected to live in **&amp;amp;#96;03-conversational-system.md&amp;amp;#96;** (and possibly &amp;amp;#96;flows.md&amp;amp;#96;) in &amp;amp;#96;../../docs/internal/&amp;amp;#96;.\\\",\""
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 4983,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"                  \\\"content\\\": \\\"- **Option B**: Add **&amp;amp;#96;docs/04-reference/07-llm-conversation-summary.md&amp;amp;#96;** that summarizes: state machine (list of states/transitions), message contract, where prompts live, and “full spec: ../../docs/internal/03-conversational-system.md”.\\\",\""
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 4992,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"- &amp;#96;../../docs/internal/&amp;#96; - main waQup project\""
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 4996,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"- docs mention ../../docs/internal/ for main waQup project\""
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 5000,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"I don't have access to \\\"Context7\\\" as a tool - the user mentioned it in the cursor rules as something to use for querying docs. I'll need to search the docs folder and the internal docs (../../docs/internal if referenced) to build the overview. Let me search the codebase and docs for:\""
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 5004,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"        \\\"contents\\\": \\\"# Core Product Documentation Reference\\\\n\\\\n**Purpose**: Reference guide to main waQup product documentation\\\\n\\\\n**Location**: &amp;amp;#96;../../docs/internal/&amp;amp;#96; (main waQup project)\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## How to Access\\\\n\\\\n**Direct Access**: &amp;amp;#96;../../docs/internal/&amp;amp;#96;  \\\\n**Use Context7**: Query docs using Context7 (recommended)\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## Complete Documentation List\\\\n\\\\n### Core Documents (01-07)\\\\n\\\\n1. **01-product-constitution.md**\\\\n   - Core identity, principles, boundaries\\\\n   - Three content types definition\\\\n   - Voice-first design principles\\\\n\\\\n2. **02-scientific-foundations.md**\\\\n   - Scientific backing and research\\\\n   - Neuroplasticity, subconscious mind\\\\n   - Voice prosody effects\\\\n\\\\n3. **03-conversational-system.md**\\\\n   - Conversation flows\\\\n   - Content types (affirmations, meditations, rituals)\\\\n   - State machine\\\\n\\\\n4. **04-ai-voice-ethics.md**\\\\n   - AI voice guidelines\\\\n   - Et [... omitted end of long line]"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 5008,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"            \\\"text\\\": \\\"**Location**: &amp;amp;#96;../../docs/internal/&amp;amp;#96; (main waQup project)\\\",\""
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 5012,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"            \\\"text\\\": \\\"**Direct Access**: &amp;amp;#96;../../docs/internal/&amp;amp;#96;  \\\",\""
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 5016,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"        \\\"contents\\\": \\\"---\\\\n\\\\n## How to Use\\\\n\\\\n1. **For Mobile Development**: \\\\n   - Tech Stack: &amp;amp;#96;02-mobile/01-technology-stack.md&amp;amp;#96;\\\\n   - Architecture: &amp;amp;#96;02-mobile/02-architecture.md&amp;amp;#96;\\\\n   - Implementation: &amp;amp;#96;02-mobile/03-implementation.md&amp;amp;#96;\\\\n\\\\n2. **For Multi-Platform Strategy**: \\\\n   - Platform Strategy: &amp;amp;#96;03-platforms/01-multi-platform-strategy.md&amp;amp;#96;\\\\n   - Browser Optimization: &amp;amp;#96;03-platforms/02-browser-optimization-strategy.md&amp;amp;#96;\\\\n\\\\n3. **For Reference Guides**: \\\\n   - Showcase access: &amp;amp;#96;04-reference/01-showcase-access.md&amp;amp;#96;\\\\n\\\\n4. **For Product Context**: See &amp;amp;#96;01-core/README.md&amp;amp;#96; → &amp;amp;#96;../../docs/internal/&amp;amp;#96;\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## Roadmap &amp;amp;amp; Planning\\\\n\\\\nSee &amp;amp;#96;../rebuild-roadmap/&amp;amp;#96; for:\\\\n- Complete roadmap\\\\n- Schema verification\\\\n- Phase analyses\\\\n- Changelog tracking\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n**Last Updated**: 2026-02-07 [... omitted end of long line]"

                {
                  "lineNumber": 5052,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"        \\\"contents\\\": \\\"- Handle interruptions gracefully\\\\n- Cache audio files locally\\\\n- Stream from CDN\\\\n\\\\n### Performance\\\\n- Lazy load screens\\\\n- Optimize images\\\\n- Code splitting\\\\n- Memoization\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## Integration Points\\\\n\\\\n### Supabase\\\\n- **Database**: PostgreSQL queries\\\\n- **Auth**: Supabase Auth v2 with PKCE\\\\n- **Storage**: Audio file upload/download\\\\n- **Realtime**: Live updates\\\\n\\\\n### External APIs\\\\n- **ElevenLabs**: Voice cloning, TTS\\\\n- **OpenAI**: Conversations, script generation\\\\n- **Stripe**: Payments, subscriptions\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## Security\\\\n\\\\n- Supabase Auth v2 with PKCE\\\\n- Secure token storage (Keychain/Keystore)\\\\n- HTTPS only\\\\n- RLS policies\\\\n- GDPR compliant\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## Performance Targets\\\\n\\\\n- App launch: &amp;amp;lt; 2s\\\\n- Screen transition: &amp;amp;lt; 300ms\\\\n- API response: &amp;amp;lt; 500ms\\\\n- Audio playback start: &amp;amp;lt; 1s\\\\n- Bundle size: &amp;amp;lt; 50MB\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## References\\\\n\\\\n- **Full  [... omitted end of long line]"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 5056,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"            \\\"text\\\": \\\"- **Full Architecture**: See &amp;amp;#96;../../../docs/internal/05-system-architecture.md&amp;amp;#96;\\\",\""
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 5060,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"        \\\"contents\\\": \\\"3. Implement same feature on Platform C (Web)\\\\n4. Test all three platforms simultaneously\\\\n5. Fix inconsistencies\\\\n6. Verify quality standards met on all platforms\\\\n\\\\n**Before Release**:\\\\n- Manual QA on all platforms simultaneously\\\\n- Performance benchmarking across platforms\\\\n- Cross-platform consistency verification\\\\n- User acceptance testing on all platforms\\\\n- Beta testing program (all platforms)\\\\n\\\\n**Post-Release**:\\\\n- Crash monitoring (Sentry) for all platforms\\\\n- Performance monitoring across platforms\\\\n- User feedback collection (platform-specific)\\\\n- A/B testing (future, all platforms)\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## References\\\\n\\\\n- [Mobile Technology Stack](../02-mobile/01-technology-stack.md)\\\\n- [Mobile Architecture](../02-mobile/02-architecture.md)\\\\n- [Mobile Implementation](../02-mobile/03-implementation.md)\\\\n- [Browser Optimization Strategy](./02-browser-optimization-strategy.md)\\\\n- [Marketplace Platform](../../ [... omitted end of long line]"

                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 5172,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"The main product docs (flows, conversational system, marketplace, voice interaction) are in &amp;#96;../../docs/internal/&amp;#96; - i.e. outside this repo (main waQup project). This repo's docs point to them via 01-core/README. I need to search within this repo for:\""

                  "lineNumber": 5176,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"                  \\\"content\\\": \\\"- [Marketplace Platform](../../../docs/internal/marketplace-platform.md)\\\"\""
                },

                  "lineNumber": 5180,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"                  \\\"content\\\": \\\"- [Conversational System](../../../docs/internal/03-conversational-system.md)\\\"\""
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 5184,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"The internal docs are in ../../docs/internal/ - that path would be outside this repo. Let me search this repo for any copies or references to flows, voice interaction, and list all routes from the roadmap vs what we have in the app.\""
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 5188,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"                  \\\"content\\\": \\\"- [Audio Generation](../../../docs/internal/audio-generation.md)\\\"\""
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 5192,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"I don't have direct access to Context7 or to ../../docs/internal/ (that's in the parent waQup project). The user said \\\"use context77\\\" - I'll assume they want me to use the docs that are referenced from this repo. The 01-core/README points to ../../docs/internal/ for flows.md, voice-interaction-design.md, marketplace-platform.md, 03-conversational-system.md. Those aren't in this repo. So I'll work from:\""
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 5196,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"                  \\\"content\\\": \\\"- [Conversational System](../../../docs/internal/03-conversational-system.md)\\\"\""
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 5200,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"I don't have a local copy of ../../docs/internal/ in this repo - it's the parent project. So I can't \\\"use Context7\\\" to query those directly from this workspace. I've used what's in this repo: rebuild-roadmap, docs (01-core README points to internal), and .cursorrules.\""
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 5204,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"- **Intended pages** – Lists what the roadmap and main-product docs (e.g. &amp;#96;flows.md&amp;#96;, &amp;#96;03-conversational-system.md&amp;#96;, &amp;#96;voice-interaction-design.md&amp;#96;, &amp;#96;marketplace-platform.md&amp;#96;) say should exist. Those live under &amp;#96;../../docs/internal/&amp;#96;; the doc says to use **Context7** to query them and summarizes the result.\""
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 5208,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"The **main product docs** (flows, conversational system, voice interaction, marketplace) are in the **parent project** at &amp;#96;../../docs/internal/&amp;#96;. This repo’s &amp;#96;docs/01-core/README.md&amp;#96; points to them and says to use **Context7** to query. I couldn’t run Context7 from here; the comparison doc is written so that when you (or someone) runs Context7 against &amp;#96;docs/internal/&amp;#96;, the structure and intent match. If something in &amp;#96;docs/internal/&amp;#96; contradicts the comparison, that doc is the place to update after you run Context7.\""
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 5221,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"            \\\"text\\\": \\\"**Reference**: Use Context7 to query &amp;amp;#96;../../docs/internal/01-product-constitution.md&amp;amp;#96;\\\",\""

                  "lineNumber": 5783,

                {
                  "lineNumber": 5819,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"        \\\"contents\\\": \\\"3. Implement same feature on Platform C (Web)\\\\n4. Test all three platforms simultaneously\\\\n5. Fix inconsistencies\\\\n6. Verify quality standards met on all platforms\\\\n\\\\n**Before Release**:\\\\n- Manual QA on all platforms simultaneously\\\\n- Performance benchmarking across platforms\\\\n- Cross-platform consistency verification\\\\n- User acceptance testing on all platforms\\\\n- Beta testing program (all platforms)\\\\n\\\\n**Post-Release**:\\\\n- Crash monitoring (Sentry) for all platforms\\\\n- Performance monitoring across platforms\\\\n- User feedback collection (platform-specific)\\\\n- A/B testing (future, all platforms)\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## References\\\\n\\\\n- [Mobile Technology Stack](../02-mobile/01-technology-stack.md)\\\\n- [Mobile Architecture](../02-mobile/02-architecture.md)\\\\n- [Mobile Implementation](../02-mobile/03-implementation.md)\\\\n- [Browser Optimization Strategy](./02-browser-optimization-strategy.md)\\\\n- [Marketplace Platform](../../ [... omitted end of long line]"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 5823,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"            \\\"text\\\": \\\"- [Marketplace Platform](../../../docs/internal/marketplace-platform.md)\\\",\""
                },

                  "lineNumber": 5827,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"            \\\"text\\\": \\\"- [Undocumented Features](../../../docs/internal/undocumented-features.md)\\\",\""
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 5831,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"        \\\"contents\\\": \\\"- Handle interruptions gracefully\\\\n- Cache audio files locally\\\\n- Stream from CDN\\\\n\\\\n### Performance\\\\n- Lazy load screens\\\\n- Optimize images\\\\n- Code splitting\\\\n- Memoization\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## Integration Points\\\\n\\\\n### Supabase\\\\n- **Database**: PostgreSQL queries\\\\n- **Auth**: Supabase Auth v2 with PKCE\\\\n- **Storage**: Audio file upload/download\\\\n- **Realtime**: Live updates\\\\n\\\\n### External APIs\\\\n- **ElevenLabs**: Voice cloning, TTS\\\\n- **OpenAI**: Conversations, script generation\\\\n- **Stripe**: Payments, subscriptions\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## Security\\\\n\\\\n- Supabase Auth v2 with PKCE\\\\n- Secure token storage (Keychain/Keystore)\\\\n- HTTPS only\\\\n- RLS policies\\\\n- GDPR compliant\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## Performance Targets\\\\n\\\\n- App launch: &amp;amp;lt; 2s\\\\n- Screen transition: &amp;amp;lt; 300ms\\\\n- API response: &amp;amp;lt; 500ms\\\\n- Audio playback start: &amp;amp;lt; 1s\\\\n- Bundle size: &amp;amp;lt; 50MB\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## References\\\\n\\\\n- **Full  [... omitted end of long line]"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 5835,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"            \\\"text\\\": \\\"- **Full Architecture**: See &amp;amp;#96;../../../docs/internal/05-system-architecture.md&amp;amp;#96;\\\",\""
                },

                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"        \\\"contents\\\": \\\"# Core Product Documentation Reference\\\\n\\\\n**Purpose**: Reference guide to main waQup product documentation\\\\n\\\\n**Location**: &amp;amp;#96;../../docs/internal/&amp;amp;#96; (main waQup project)\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## How to Access\\\\n\\\\n**Direct Access**: &amp;amp;#96;../../docs/internal/&amp;amp;#96;  \\\\n**Use Context7**: Query docs using Context7 (recommended)\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## Complete Documentation List\\\\n\\\\n### Core Documents (01-07)\\\\n\\\\n1. **01-product-constitution.md**\\\\n   - Core identity, principles, boundaries\\\\n   - Three content types definition\\\\n   - Voice-first design principles\\\\n\\\\n2. **02-scientific-foundations.md**\\\\n   - Scientific backing and research\\\\n   - Neuroplasticity, subconscious mind\\\\n   - Voice prosody effects\\\\n\\\\n3. **03-conversational-system.md**\\\\n   - Conversation flows\\\\n   - Content types (affirmations, meditations, rituals)\\\\n   - State machine\\\\n\\\\n4. **04-ai-voice-ethics.md**\\\\n   - AI voice guidelines\\\\n   - Et [... omitted end of long line]"

                {
                  "lineNumber": 5988,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"        \\\"contents\\\": \\\"---\\\\n\\\\n## How to Use\\\\n\\\\n1. **For Mobile Development**: \\\\n   - Tech Stack: &amp;amp;#96;02-mobile/01-technology-stack.md&amp;amp;#96;\\\\n   - Architecture: &amp;amp;#96;02-mobile/02-architecture.md&amp;amp;#96;\\\\n   - Implementation: &amp;amp;#96;02-mobile/03-implementation.md&amp;amp;#96;\\\\n\\\\n2. **For Multi-Platform Strategy**: \\\\n   - Platform Strategy: &amp;amp;#96;03-platforms/01-multi-platform-strategy.md&amp;amp;#96;\\\\n   - Browser Optimization: &amp;amp;#96;03-platforms/02-browser-optimization-strategy.md&amp;amp;#96;\\\\n\\\\n3. **For Reference Guides**: \\\\n   - Showcase access: &amp;amp;#96;04-reference/01-showcase-access.md&amp;amp;#96;\\\\n\\\\n4. **For Product Context**: See &amp;amp;#96;01-core/README.md&amp;amp;#96; → &amp;amp;#96;../../docs/internal/&amp;amp;#96;\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## Roadmap &amp;amp;amp; Planning\\\\n\\\\nSee &amp;amp;#96;../rebuild-roadmap/&amp;amp;#96; for:\\\\n- Complete roadmap\\\\n- Schema verification\\\\n- Phase analyses\\\\n- Changelog tracking\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n**Last Updated**: 2026-02-07 [... omitted end of long line]"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 5992,

                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 5996,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"        \\\"contents\\\": \\\"# waQup Production Rebuild Roadmap\\\\n\\\\n**Goal**: Rebuild waQup from scratch as a production-ready mobile app for iOS and Android app stores, with high-quality design, fast performance, and scientific backing.\\\\n\\\\n**Approach**: Each step is independently runnable with clear, visible UI differences. We build incrementally, testing at each stage.\\\\n\\\\n**Important**: For detailed analysis of each phase with \\\\\\\"now/after\\\\\\\" comparisons, schema verification, and step-by-step implementation details, see:\\\\n- [Schema Verification](./02-schema-verification.md) - Complete database schema analysis\\\\n- [Phase Analyses](../02-phases/) - Detailed analysis for each phase\\\\n- [Changelog](../03-tracking/01-changelog.md) - **Track step completion and updates**\\\\n- [Analysis Template](../03-tracking/02-analysis-template.md) - Template for phase analysis\\\\n- [Step Tracking Template](../03-tracking/03-step-tracking.md) - Template for tracking indivi [... omitted end of long line]"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 6000,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"            \\\"text\\\": \\\"- [Technology Stack](../../docs/02-mobile/01-technology-stack.md) - Finalized tech stack\\\",\""
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 6004,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"            \\\"text\\\": \\\"- [Architecture](../../docs/02-mobile/02-architecture.md) - Mobile architecture\\\",\""
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 6008,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"            \\\"text\\\": \\\"- [Implementation](../../docs/02-mobile/03-implementation.md) - Implementation guide\\\",\""
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 6016,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"            \\\"text\\\": \\\"4. **For Product Context**: See &amp;amp;#96;../01-core/&amp;amp;#96; → &amp;amp;#96;../../docs/internal/&amp;amp;#96;\\\",\""
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 6020,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"        \\\"contents\\\": \\\"## Using Context7\\\\n\\\\n**Recommended**: Use Context7 to query these docs\\\\n\\\\n**Example**:\\\\n&amp;amp;#96;&amp;amp;#96;&amp;amp;#96;\\\\nContext7 Query: \\\\\\\"What are the three content types in waQup?\\\\\\\"\\\\nReference: ../../docs/internal/01-product-constitution.md\\\\n&amp;amp;#96;&amp;amp;#96;&amp;amp;#96;\\\\n\\\\nSee &amp;amp;#96;../03-reference/01-context7-usage.md&amp;amp;#96; for detailed guide.\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n**Purpose**: Reference only - main docs stay in &amp;amp;#96;../../docs/internal/&amp;amp;#96;\\\",\""
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 6024,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"            \\\"text\\\": \\\"Reference: ../../docs/internal/01-product-constitution.md\\\",\""
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 6028,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"            \\\"text\\\": \\\"**Purpose**: Reference only - main docs stay in &amp;amp;#96;../../docs/internal/&amp;amp;#96;\\\",\""
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 6036,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"            \\\"text\\\": \\\"**Reference**: Use Context7 to query &amp;amp;#96;../../docs/internal/01-product-constitution.md&amp;amp;#96;\\\",\""
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 6044,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"            \\\"text\\\": \\\"- &amp;amp;#96;../../docs/internal/&amp;amp;#96; - Complete product documentation\\\",\""
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 6048,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"        \\\"contents\\\": \\\"- Handle interruptions gracefully\\\\n- Cache audio files locally\\\\n- Stream from CDN\\\\n\\\\n### Performance\\\\n- Lazy load screens\\\\n- Optimize images\\\\n- Code splitting\\\\n- Memoization\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## Integration Points\\\\n\\\\n### Supabase\\\\n- **Database**: PostgreSQL queries\\\\n- **Auth**: Supabase Auth v2 with PKCE\\\\n- **Storage**: Audio file upload/download\\\\n- **Realtime**: Live updates\\\\n\\\\n### External APIs\\\\n- **ElevenLabs**: Voice cloning, TTS\\\\n- **OpenAI**: Conversations, script generation\\\\n- **Stripe**: Payments, subscriptions\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## Security\\\\n\\\\n- Supabase Auth v2 with PKCE\\\\n- Secure token storage (Keychain/Keystore)\\\\n- HTTPS only\\\\n- RLS policies\\\\n- GDPR compliant\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## Performance Targets\\\\n\\\\n- App launch: &amp;amp;lt; 2s\\\\n- Screen transition: &amp;amp;lt; 300ms\\\\n- API response: &amp;amp;lt; 500ms\\\\n- Audio playback start: &amp;amp;lt; 1s\\\\n- Bundle size: &amp;amp;lt; 50MB\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## References\\\\n\\\\n- **Full  [... omitted end of long line]"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 6052,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"            \\\"text\\\": \\\"- **Full Architecture**: See &amp;amp;#96;../../../docs/internal/05-system-architecture.md&amp;amp;#96;\\\",\""
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 6056,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"        \\\"contents\\\": \\\"- **When verifying**: Use Context7 to check requirements\\\\n- **When documenting**: Use Context7 to reference existing patterns\\\\n\\\\n### Documentation Access Strategy\\\\n\\\\n1. **Primary**: Use Context7 to query docs (fastest, most accurate)\\\\n2. **Secondary**: Read files directly if Context7 unavailable\\\\n3. **Reference**: Use &amp;amp;#96;../../docs/internal/&amp;amp;#96; for full context\\\\n4. **Mobile**: Use &amp;amp;#96;docs/02-mobile/&amp;amp;#96; for mobile-specific information\\\\n\\\\n### When Creating New Docs\\\\n\\\\n- **Use Context7 first** - query existing docs for patterns\\\\n- **Reference existing docs** - adapt from &amp;amp;#96;../../docs/&amp;amp;#96;\\\\n- **Follow numbering** - use numbered format (01-, 02-, etc.)\\\\n- **Keep structure consistent** - follow existing patterns\\\\n- **Update changelog** - document what was created\\\\n- **Link from README** - add to appropriate README\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## Technology Stack (Finalized)\\\\n\\\\n### Core\\\\n- **Framewo [... omitted end of long line]"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 6060,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"            \\\"text\\\": \\\"3. **Reference**: Use &amp;amp;#96;../../docs/internal/&amp;amp;#96; for full context\\\",\""
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 6064,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"            \\\"text\\\": \\\"- **Reference existing docs** - adapt from &amp;amp;#96;../../docs/&amp;amp;#96;\\\",\""
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 6068,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"The internal docs are referenced as &amp;#96;../../docs/internal/&amp;#96; - that's outside this repo (main waQup project). This repo (waqup-new) doesn't contain those files. I need to:\""
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 6072,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"                  \\\"content\\\": \\\"**References**: Roadmap &amp;amp;#96;rebuild-roadmap/01-planning/01-roadmap.md&amp;amp;#96;, phases &amp;amp;#96;rebuild-roadmap/02-phases/*&amp;amp;#96;; main product docs &amp;amp;#96;../../docs/internal/&amp;amp;#96; (flows, conversational-system, voice-interaction-design, marketplace-platform); current app &amp;amp;#96;packages/web/app/&amp;amp;#96; and &amp;amp;#96;/pages&amp;amp;#96;.\\\"\""
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 6076,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"                  \\\"content\\\": \\\"- [Conversational System](../../../docs/internal/03-conversational-system.md)\\\"\""
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 6080,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"1. Summarizes what docs exist in-repo vs what's only referenced (external ../../docs/internal/)\""
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 6088,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"            \\\"text\\\": \\\"**Reference**: Use Context7 to query &amp;amp;#96;../../docs/internal/01-product-constitution.md&amp;amp;#96;\\\",\""
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 6092,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"        \\\"contents\\\": \\\"# Core Product Documentation Reference\\\\n\\\\n**Purpose**: Reference guide to main waQup product documentation\\\\n\\\\n**Location**: &amp;amp;#96;../../docs/internal/&amp;amp;#96; (main waQup project)\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## How to Access\\\\n\\\\n**Direct Access**: &amp;amp;#96;../../docs/internal/&amp;amp;#96;  \\\\n**Use Context7**: Query docs using Context7 (recommended)\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## Complete Documentation List\\\\n\\\\n### Core Documents (01-07)\\\\n\\\\n1. **01-product-constitution.md**\\\\n   - Core identity, principles, boundaries\\\\n   - Three content types definition\\\\n   - Voice-first design principles\\\\n\\\\n2. **02-scientific-foundations.md**\\\\n   - Scientific backing and research\\\\n   - Neuroplasticity, subconscious mind\\\\n   - Voice prosody effects\\\\n\\\\n3. **03-conversational-system.md**\\\\n   - Conversation flows\\\\n   - Content types (affirmations, meditations, rituals)\\\\n   - State machine\\\\n\\\\n4. **04-ai-voice-ethics.md**\\\\n   - AI voice guidelines\\\\n   - Et [... omitted end of long line]"

We build incrementally, testing at each stage.\\\\n\\\\n**Important**: For detailed analysis of each phase with \\\\\\\"now/after\\\\\\\" comparisons, schema verification, and step-by-step implementation details, see:\\\\n- [Schema Verification](./02-schema-verification.md) - Complete database schema analysis\\\\n- [Phase Analyses](../02-phases/) - Detailed analysis for each phase\\\\n- [Changelog](../03-tracking/01-changelog.md) - **Track step completion and updates**\\\\n- [Analysis Template](../03-tracking/02-analysis-template.md) - Template for phase analysis\\\\n- [Step Tracking Template](../03-tracking/03-step-tracking.md) - Template for tracking indivi [... omitted end of long line]"

                  "lineNumber": 6136,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"        \\\"contents\\\": \\\"**Tracking** (&amp;amp;#96;03-tracking/&amp;amp;#96;):\\\\n- &amp;amp;#96;01-changelog.md&amp;amp;#96; - Step completion tracking, updates, status\\\\n- &amp;amp;#96;02-analysis-template.md&amp;amp;#96; - Template for creating phase analysis documents\\\\n- &amp;amp;#96;03-step-tracking.md&amp;amp;#96; - Template for tracking individual steps\\\\n\\\\n### Using Context7 for Documentation\\\\n\\\\n**ALWAYS use Context7 when you need documentation information:**\\\\n\\\\n1. **For Product Understanding**:\\\\n   &amp;amp;#96;&amp;amp;#96;&amp;amp;#96;\\\\n   Use Context7 to query: \\\\\\\"What are the three content types in waQup and how do they differ?\\\\\\\"\\\\n   Reference: ../../docs/internal/01-product-constitution.md\\\\n   &amp;amp;#96;&amp;amp;#96;&amp;amp;#96;\\\\n\\\\n2. **For Scientific Backing**:\\\\n   &amp;amp;#96;&amp;amp;#96;&amp;amp;#96;\\\\n   Use Context7 to query: \\\\\\\"What is the scientific foundation for voice-first design?\\\\\\\"\\\\n   Reference: ../../docs/internal/02-scientific-foundations.md\\\\n   &amp;amp;#96;&amp;amp;#96;&amp;amp;# [... omitted end of long line]"

                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 6164,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"            \\\"text\\\": \\\"- ✅ Scientific references document (&amp;amp;#96;docs/01-core/README.md&amp;amp;#96; → &amp;amp;#96;../../docs/internal/02-scientific-foundations.md&amp;amp;#96;)\\\",\""
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 6168,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"1. **Architecture**: In-repo we have docs/02-mobile/02-architecture.md (mobile layers, data flow, integration points). Full system architecture is referenced as ../../docs/internal/05-system-architecture.md (external).\""
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 6172,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"- **External**: Full system (APIs, infra) is in &amp;#96;../../docs/internal/05-system-architecture.md&amp;#96;. There is no in-repo doc for the **web app** (Next.js layout, API routes).\""
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 6176,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"- **Gap**: No in-repo spec for the **state machine** (states/transitions), **message/API contract**, or **prompt strategy**. That lives in &amp;#96;../../docs/internal/03-conversational-system.md&amp;#96;.\""
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 6180,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"- **Gap**: No in-repo summary of discovery/creator/verification/viral/revenue; that’s in &amp;#96;../../docs/internal/marketplace-platform.md&amp;#96;.\""

                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 6248,

                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 6256,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"      \\\"prompt\\\": \\\"The GitHub URL you gave (IndiasFernandes/waqup) returned 404. The docs in waqup-new reference &amp;amp;#96;../../docs/internal/&amp;amp;#96; for flows.md, audio-generation.md, marketplace-platform.md, etc. How can we access these main product docs to sync/update waqup-new?\\\",\""
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 6260,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"          \\\"label\\\": \\\"The main waqup project is a sibling folder (e.g. waqup-app/docs/internal/) — I can provide the path\\\"\""
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 6264,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"I'm clarifying the correct relative paths for docs/internal based on project structure. &amp;lt;/details&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/think&amp;gt;\""
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 6268,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"I'm checking the docs/internal directory structure to confirm if it's actually inside the main waqup project or a separate internal docs area. &amp;lt;/details&amp;gt;&amp;lt;/think&amp;gt;\""
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 6276,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"                  \\\"content\\\": \\\"All of that is expected to live in **&amp;amp;#96;03-conversational-system.md&amp;amp;#96;** (and possibly &amp;amp;#96;flows.md&amp;amp;#96;) in &amp;amp;#96;../../docs/internal/&amp;amp;#96;.\\\",\""
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 6280,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"                  \\\"content\\\": \\\"- **Option B**: Add **&amp;amp;#96;docs/04-reference/07-llm-conversation-summary.md&amp;amp;#96;** that summarizes: state machine (list of states/transitions), message contract, where prompts live, and “full spec: ../../docs/internal/03-conversational-system.md”.\\\",\""
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 6289,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"- &amp;#96;../../docs/internal/&amp;#96; - main waQup project\""
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 6293,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"- docs mention ../../docs/internal/ for main waQup project\""
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 6297,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"I don't have access to \\\"Context7\\\" as a tool - the user mentioned it in the cursor rules as something to use for querying docs. I'll need to search the docs folder and the internal docs (../../docs/internal if referenced) to build the overview. Let me search the codebase and docs for:\""
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 6301,

                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 6345,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"            \\\"text\\\": \\\"- **Audio Details**: See &amp;amp;#96;../../../docs/internal/audio-generation.md&amp;amp;#96;\\\",\""
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 6349,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"        \\\"contents\\\": \\\"- Handle interruptions gracefully\\\\n- Cache audio files locally\\\\n- Stream from CDN\\\\n\\\\n### Performance\\\\n- Lazy load screens\\\\n- Optimize images\\\\n- Code splitting\\\\n- Memoization\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## Integration Points\\\\n\\\\n### Supabase\\\\n- **Database**: PostgreSQL queries\\\\n- **Auth**: Supabase Auth v2 with PKCE\\\\n- **Storage**: Audio file upload/download\\\\n- **Realtime**: Live updates\\\\n\\\\n### External APIs\\\\n- **ElevenLabs**: Voice cloning, TTS\\\\n- **OpenAI**: Conversations, script generation\\\\n- **Stripe**: Payments, subscriptions\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## Security\\\\n\\\\n- Supabase Auth v2 with PKCE\\\\n- Secure token storage (Keychain/Keystore)\\\\n- HTTPS only\\\\n- RLS policies\\\\n- GDPR compliant\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## Performance Targets\\\\n\\\\n- App launch: &amp;amp;lt; 2s\\\\n- Screen transition: &amp;amp;lt; 300ms\\\\n- API response: &amp;amp;lt; 500ms\\\\n- Audio playback start: &amp;amp;lt; 1s\\\\n- Bundle size: &amp;amp;lt; 50MB\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## References\\\\n\\\\n- **Full  [... omitted end of long line]"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 6353,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"            \\\"text\\\": \\\"- **Full Architecture**: See &amp;amp;#96;../../../docs/internal/05-system-architecture.md&amp;amp;#96;\\\",\""
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 6357,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"        \\\"contents\\\": \\\"3. Implement same feature on Platform C (Web)\\\\n4. Test all three platforms simultaneously\\\\n5. Fix inconsistencies\\\\n6. Verify quality standards met on all platforms\\\\n\\\\n**Before Release**:\\\\n- Manual QA on all platforms simultaneously\\\\n- Performance benchmarking across platforms\\\\n- Cross-platform consistency verification\\\\n- User acceptance testing on all platforms\\\\n- Beta testing program (all platforms)\\\\n\\\\n**Post-Release**:\\\\n- Crash monitoring (Sentry) for all platforms\\\\n- Performance monitoring across platforms\\\\n- User feedback collection (platform-specific)\\\\n- A/B testing (future, all platforms)\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## References\\\\n\\\\n- [Mobile Technology Stack](../02-mobile/01-technology-stack.md)\\\\n- [Mobile Architecture](../02-mobile/02-architecture.md)\\\\n- [Mobile Implementation](../02-mobile/03-implementation.md)\\\\n- [Browser Optimization Strategy](./02-browser-optimization-strategy.md)\\\\n- [Marketplace Platform](../../ [... omitted end of long line]"

                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 6469,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"The main product docs (flows, conversational system, marketplace, voice interaction) are in &amp;#96;../../docs/internal/&amp;#96; - i.e. outside this repo (main waQup project). This repo's docs point to them via 01-core/README. I need to search within this repo for:\""

                  "lineNumber": 6473,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"                  \\\"content\\\": \\\"- [Marketplace Platform](../../../docs/internal/marketplace-platform.md)\\\"\""

                  "lineNumber": 6477,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"                  \\\"content\\\": \\\"- [Conversational System](../../../docs/internal/03-conversational-system.md)\\\"\""
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 6481,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"The internal docs are in ../../docs/internal/ - that path would be outside this repo. Let me search this repo for any copies or references to flows, voice interaction, and list all routes from the roadmap vs what we have in the app.\""
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 6485,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"                  \\\"content\\\": \\\"- [Audio Generation](../../../docs/internal/audio-generation.md)\\\"\""
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 6489,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"I don't have direct access to Context7 or to ../../docs/internal/ (that's in the parent waQup project). The user said \\\"use context77\\\" - I'll assume they want me to use the docs that are referenced from this repo. The 01-core/README points to ../../docs/internal/ for flows.md, voice-interaction-design.md, marketplace-platform.md, 03-conversational-system.md. Those aren't in this repo. So I'll work from:\""
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 6493,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"                  \\\"content\\\": \\\"- [Conversational System](../../../docs/internal/03-conversational-system.md)\\\"\""
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 6497,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"I don't have a local copy of ../../docs/internal/ in this repo - it's the parent project. So I can't \\\"use Context7\\\" to query those directly from this workspace. I've used what's in this repo: rebuild-roadmap, docs (01-core README points to internal), and .cursorrules.\""
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 6501,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"- **Intended pages** – Lists what the roadmap and main-product docs (e.g. &amp;#96;flows.md&amp;#96;, &amp;#96;03-conversational-system.md&amp;#96;, &amp;#96;voice-interaction-design.md&amp;#96;, &amp;#96;marketplace-platform.md&amp;#96;) say should exist. Those live under &amp;#96;../../docs/internal/&amp;#96;; the doc says to use **Context7** to query them and summarizes the result.\""
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 6505,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"The **main product docs** (flows, conversational system, voice interaction, marketplace) are in the **parent project** at &amp;#96;../../docs/internal/&amp;#96;. This repo’s &amp;#96;docs/01-core/README.md&amp;#96; points to them and says to use **Context7** to query. I couldn’t run Context7 from here; the comparison doc is written so that when you (or someone) runs Context7 against &amp;#96;docs/internal/&amp;#96;, the structure and intent match. If something in &amp;#96;docs/internal/&amp;#96; contradicts the comparison, that doc is the place to update after you run Context7.\""
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 6518,
                  "content": "                  \"content\": \"            \\\"text\\\": \\\"**Reference**: Use Context7 to query &amp;amp;#96;../../docs/internal/01-product-constitution.md&amp;amp;#96;\\\",\""

              "matches": [
                {
                  "lineNumber": 24,
                  "content": "I need to search through the docs (both in this project and the referenced ../../docs/internal/) to understand what exists and identify any gaps. Let me start by exploring the documentation structure and then dive into each area."

                  "lineNumber": 136,
                  "content": "  \"query\": \"Where is the main product internal documentation (product constitution, system architecture, database)?\","

                {
                  "lineNumber": 156,
                  "content": "        \"contents\": \"# Core Product Documentation Reference\\n\\n**Purpose**: Reference guide to main waQup product documentation\\n\\n**Location**: &amp;#96;../../docs/internal/&amp;#96; (main waQup project)\\n\\n---\\n\\n## How to Access\\n\\n**Direct Access**: &amp;#96;../../docs/internal/&amp;#96;  \\n**Use Context7**: Query docs using Context7 (recommended)\\n\\n---\\n\\n## Complete Documentation List\\n\\n### Core Documents (01-07)\\n\\n1. **01-product-constitution.md**\\n   - Core identity, principles, boundaries\\n   - Three content types definition\\n   - Voice-first design principles\\n\\n2. **02-scientific-foundations.md**\\n   - Scientific backing and research\\n   - Neuroplasticity, subconscious mind\\n   - Voice prosody effects\\n\\n3. **03-conversational-system.md**\\n   - Conversation flows\\n   - Content types (affirmations, meditations, rituals)\\n   - State machine\\n\\n4. **04-ai-voice-ethics.md**\\n   - AI voice guidelines\\n   - Ethical boundaries\\n   - Privacy principles\\n\\n5. **05-system-architecture.md**\\n   - C [... omitted end of long line]"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 174,
                  "content": "            \"text\": \"**Location**: &amp;#96;../../docs/internal/&amp;#96; (main waQup project)\","
